--- Content from referenced files ---
Content from @gui/left_panel.py:
from PyQt6.QtWidgets import (QWidget, QVBoxLayout, QFormLayout, QHBoxLayout, QComboBox, 
                             QSpinBox, QDoubleSpinBox, QLineEdit, QLabel, 
                             QPushButton, QFrame, QProgressBar)
from PyQt6.QtCore import pyqtSignal
from printer_com import SerialPrinterWorker
from gui.settings import load_settings
from gui.feedback_dialog import FeedbackDialog

class LeftPanel(QWidget):
    values_changed = pyqtSignal()

    def __init__(self, parent=None):
        super().__init__(parent)
        self.setFixedWidth(350)
        
        self.settings = load_settings()
        self.sklo_dims = self.settings.get("sklo_dims", {})

        main_layout = QVBoxLayout(self)
        main_layout.setContentsMargins(10, 10, 10, 10)
        
        # --- Tlačítko Načíst ---
        self.btn_load = QPushButton("Načíst vzorek (G-code/SVG/DXF)")
        main_layout.addWidget(self.btn_load)
        
        # --- Exportní tlačítka vedle sebe ---
        layout_export = QHBoxLayout()
        self.btn_save = QPushButton("Uložit G-code")
        self.btn_csv = QPushButton("Uložit CSV")
        self.btn_csv.setStyleSheet("QPushButton { background-color: #198754; } QPushButton:hover { background-color: #157347; }")
        
        layout_export.addWidget(self.btn_save)
        layout_export.addWidget(self.btn_csv)
        main_layout.addLayout(layout_export)
        
        line = QFrame()
        line.setFrameShape(QFrame.Shape.HLine)
        main_layout.addWidget(line)
        
        # HLAVNÍ FORMULÁŘ (Uloženo jako vlastnost třídy)
        self.form_layout = QFormLayout()
        
        # --- Podložka a Sklíčka ---
        self.form_layout.addRow(QLabel("<b>--- Podložka ---</b>"))
        
        self.cmb_holder = QComboBox()
        self.cmb_holder.addItems(["Na jeden vzorek", "Multiplex (více sklíček)"])
        self.form_layout.addRow("Typ držáku:", self.cmb_holder)
        
        self.cmb_glass = QComboBox()
        self.cmb_glass.addItems(list(self.sklo_dims.keys()))
        self.form_layout.addRow("Sklíčko:", self.cmb_glass)
        
        # --- Skrytý řádek pro vlastní rozměry do jednoho bloku ---
        self.widget_vlastni_sklo = QWidget()
        layout_vlastni_sklo = QHBoxLayout(self.widget_vlastni_sklo)
        layout_vlastni_sklo.setContentsMargins(0, 0, 0, 0)

        self.inp_glass_x = QLineEdit("25.0")
        self.inp_glass_y = QLineEdit("75.0")
        self.inp_glass_z = QLineEdit("2.0")

        layout_vlastni_sklo.addWidget(QLabel("Šířka:"))
        layout_vlastni_sklo.addWidget(self.inp_glass_x)
        layout_vlastni_sklo.addWidget(QLabel("Výška:"))
        layout_vlastni_sklo.addWidget(self.inp_glass_y)
        layout_vlastni_sklo.addWidget(QLabel("Tloušťka:"))
        layout_vlastni_sklo.addWidget(self.inp_glass_z)
        layout_vlastni_sklo.addWidget(QLabel("mm"))

        self.form_layout.addRow(self.widget_vlastni_sklo)
        self.widget_vlastni_sklo.setVisible(False)
        # ---------------------------------------------------------

        self.inp_count = QSpinBox()
        self.inp_count.setRange(1, 50)
        self.inp_count.setValue(1)
        self.form_layout.addRow("Počet vzorků:", self.inp_count)
        
        self.inp_bed_temp = QSpinBox()
        self.inp_bed_temp.setRange(0, 100)
        self.inp_bed_temp.setSingleStep(5)
        self.inp_bed_temp.setValue(0)
        self.inp_bed_temp.setSpecialValueText("vypnuto")
        self.inp_bed_temp.setSuffix(" °C")
        self.inp_bed_temp.valueChanged.connect(self._handle_bed_temp_change)
        self.form_layout.addRow("Výhřev podložky:", self.inp_bed_temp)

        # --- Parametry tisku ---
        self.form_layout.addRow(QLabel("<b>--- Tiskové parametry ---</b>"))
        
        self.inp_z_offset = QDoubleSpinBox()
        self.inp_z_offset.setRange(0.0, 5.0)
        self.inp_z_offset.setSingleStep(0.05)
        self.inp_z_offset.setValue(0.2)
        self.form_layout.addRow("Z-offset vrstvy [mm]:", self.inp_z_offset)

        self.lbl_total_z = QLabel("0.00 mm")
        self.lbl_total_z.setStyleSheet("color: #17a2b8; font-weight: bold;")
        self.form_layout.addRow("Absolutní Z tiskárny:", self.lbl_total_z)
        
        self.inp_extrusion = QDoubleSpinBox()
        self.inp_extrusion.setRange(0.001, 100.0) # Zvýšený rozsah pro mikrolitry
        self.inp_extrusion.setSingleStep(0.1)
        self.inp_extrusion.setDecimals(3)
        self.inp_extrusion.setValue(1.0) # Výchozí hodnota 1 µl/mm
        self.form_layout.addRow("Extruze [µl/mm]:", self.inp_extrusion)
        
        self.inp_nozzle = QDoubleSpinBox()
        self.inp_nozzle.setRange(0.1, 10.0)
        self.inp_nozzle.setSingleStep(0.1)
        self.inp_nozzle.setValue(0.4)
        self.form_layout.addRow("Průměr trysky [mm]:", self.inp_nozzle)

        self.inp_speed = QSpinBox()
        self.inp_speed.setRange(10, 10000)
        self.inp_speed.setSingleStep(100)
        self.inp_speed.setValue(1500)
        self.form_layout.addRow("Rychlost tisku [mm/min]:", self.inp_speed)
        
        self.inp_retract = QDoubleSpinBox()
        self.inp_retract.setRange(0.0, 50.0)
        self.inp_retract.setSingleStep(0.1)
        self.inp_retract.setValue(1.0)
        self.form_layout.addRow("Retrakce [mm]:", self.inp_retract)
        
        main_layout.addLayout(self.form_layout)
        # --- Vektorové výplně (SVG/DXF) ---
        self.form_layout.addRow(QLabel("<b>--- Vektorové výplně ---</b>"))

        self.cmb_infill_style = QComboBox()
        self.cmb_infill_style.addItems(["S okraji", "Bez okrajů", "Okraje", "Had"])
        self.form_layout.addRow("Styl výplně:", self.cmb_infill_style)

        self.widget_infill = QWidget()
        layout_infill = QHBoxLayout(self.widget_infill)
        layout_infill.setContentsMargins(0, 0, 0, 0)

        self.inp_infill_val = QDoubleSpinBox()
        self.inp_infill_val.setRange(0.1, 200.0)
        self.inp_infill_val.setValue(1.0)
        self.inp_infill_val.setSingleStep(0.1)

        self.cmb_infill_type = QComboBox()
        self.cmb_infill_type.addItems(["mm", "%"])

        layout_infill.addWidget(self.inp_infill_val)
        layout_infill.addWidget(self.cmb_infill_type)
        self.form_layout.addRow("Hustota výplně:", self.widget_infill)

        self.inp_infill_angle = QSpinBox()
        self.inp_infill_angle.setRange(0, 90)
        self.inp_infill_angle.setValue(0)
        self.form_layout.addRow("Úhel výplně [°]:", self.inp_infill_angle)
        main_layout.addStretch()

        # --- Ovládání tiskárny ---
        printer_layout = QFormLayout()
        printer_layout.addRow(QLabel("<b>--- Ovládání tiskárny ---</b>"))

        self.lbl_status = QLabel("Stav: Odpojeno")
        printer_layout.addRow(self.lbl_status)

        # --- Ovládání tiskárny ---
        self.btn_connect = QPushButton("Připojit tiskárnu")
        self.btn_connect.setStyleSheet("QPushButton { background-color: #0d6efd; }")
        main_layout.addWidget(self.btn_connect)
        
        self.btn_start_print = QPushButton("Start tisku")
        self.btn_start_print.setStyleSheet("QPushButton { background-color: #198754; }")
        self.btn_start_print.hide() # Zpočátku skryto
        main_layout.addWidget(self.btn_start_print)
        
        # Kontejner pro Pozastavit / Zastavit v jednom řádku
        self.print_controls_widget = QWidget()
        layout_print_controls = QHBoxLayout(self.print_controls_widget)
        layout_print_controls.setContentsMargins(0, 0, 0, 0)
        
        self.btn_pause = QPushButton("Pozastavit")
        self.btn_pause.setStyleSheet("QPushButton { background-color: #ffc107; color: black; }")
        
        self.btn_stop = QPushButton("Zastavit")
        self.btn_stop.setStyleSheet("QPushButton { background-color: #dc3545; }")
        
        layout_print_controls.addWidget(self.btn_pause)
        layout_print_controls.addWidget(self.btn_stop)
        self.print_controls_widget.hide() # Zpočátku skryto
        
        main_layout.addWidget(self.print_controls_widget)

        self.progress = QProgressBar()
        self.progress.setValue(0)
        printer_layout.addRow(self.progress)

        main_layout.addLayout(printer_layout)

        # --- Tlačítko Feedback (úplně dole) ---
        self.btn_feedback = QPushButton("Nahlásit chybu / Nápad")
        self.btn_feedback.setStyleSheet("QPushButton { background-color: #ffc107; color: black; } QPushButton:hover { background-color: #ffca2c; }")
        self.btn_feedback.clicked.connect(self.open_feedback)
        main_layout.addWidget(self.btn_feedback)

        # --- Propojení událostí ---
        self.cmb_holder.currentIndexChanged.connect(self._toggle_bed_heating)
        self._toggle_bed_heating() # Inicializace při startu
        self.cmb_glass.currentIndexChanged.connect(self._toggle_custom_glass)
        
        inputs = [self.cmb_holder, self.cmb_glass, self.inp_count, self.inp_bed_temp, self.inp_z_offset, 
                  self.inp_extrusion, self.inp_nozzle, self.cmb_infill_style, 
                  self.inp_infill_val, self.cmb_infill_type, self.inp_infill_angle,
                  self.inp_speed, self.inp_retract]
        for widget in inputs:
            if isinstance(widget, QComboBox):
                widget.currentIndexChanged.connect(self.values_changed.emit)
            elif isinstance(widget, (QSpinBox, QDoubleSpinBox)):
                widget.valueChanged.connect(self.values_changed.emit)
                
        line_inputs = [self.inp_glass_x, self.inp_glass_y, self.inp_glass_z]
        for widget in line_inputs:
            widget.textChanged.connect(self.values_changed.emit)

        # Inicializace stavu zobrazení skla při zapnutí
        self._toggle_custom_glass()

        # --- Inicializace vlákna ---
        self.worker = SerialPrinterWorker()
        self.worker.status_changed.connect(self.update_status)
        self.worker.progress_changed.connect(self.progress.setValue)

        self.btn_connect.clicked.connect(self.toggle_connection)
        self.btn_stop.clicked.connect(self.stop_print)
        self.btn_pause.clicked.connect(self.toggle_pause)
        # --- Omezení maximálního počtu vzorků ---
        self.values_changed.connect(self._aktualizovat_limit_vzorku)
        self.values_changed.connect(self._update_total_z)
        self._aktualizovat_limit_vzorku() # Prvotní výpočet při startu
        self._update_total_z()

    def _toggle_custom_glass(self):
        is_custom = self.cmb_glass.currentText() == "Vlastní"
        self.widget_vlastni_sklo.setVisible(is_custom)
        self.values_changed.emit()
        
    def _toggle_bed_heating(self):
        is_multiplex = self.cmb_holder.currentText() == "Multiplex (více sklíček)"
        self.inp_bed_temp.setVisible(is_multiplex)
        label = self.form_layout.labelForField(self.inp_bed_temp)
        if label:
            label.setVisible(is_multiplex)
            
        if not is_multiplex:
            self.inp_bed_temp.setValue(0)
            
    def _handle_bed_temp_change(self, val):
        # Pokud se uživatel snaží jít z 0 nahoru (na 5) nebo z 30 dolů (na 25)
        if 0 < val < 30:
            self.inp_bed_temp.blockSignals(True)
            if val > 15: # Pokud je blíž k 30
                self.inp_bed_temp.setValue(30)
            else: # Pokud je blíž k 0
                self.inp_bed_temp.setValue(0)
            self.inp_bed_temp.blockSignals(False)
            self.values_changed.emit()
            
    def update_status(self, msg):
        self.lbl_status.setText(f"Stav: {msg}")

        if msg == "Připojeno":
            self.lbl_status.setStyleSheet("color: #198754; font-weight: bold;")
            self.set_ui_connected()

        elif msg in ("Tisk dokončen", "Tisk zrušen"):
            # Tiskárna je stále připojená, jen skončil tisk (vrátíme tlačítko Start)
            self.lbl_status.setStyleSheet("color: #198754; font-weight: bold;")
            self.set_ui_connected()

        elif "Chyba" in msg or msg == "Odpojeno":
            # Při odpojení nebo chybě linky schováme ovládání tisku
            self.lbl_status.setStyleSheet("color: #dc3545; font-weight: bold;")
            self.set_ui_disconnected()
            
    def toggle_connection(self):
        if self.worker.serial_conn and self.worker.serial_conn.is_open:
            self.worker.stop()
        else:
            self.worker.connect_printer()

    def open_feedback(self):
        dialog = FeedbackDialog(self)
        dialog.exec()

    def stop_print(self):
        self.worker.stop()
        self.progress.setValue(0)
        self.set_ui_connected()

    def get_all_params(self):
        glass_type = self.cmb_glass.currentText()
        if glass_type == "Vlastní":
            try:
                slide_w = float(self.inp_glass_x.text())
                slide_h = float(self.inp_glass_y.text())
                slide_z = float(self.inp_glass_z.text())
            except ValueError:
                slide_w, slide_h, slide_z = 25.0, 75.0, 1.0
        else:
            slide_w, slide_h, slide_z = self.sklo_dims.get(glass_type, [25.0, 75.0, 1.0])

        return {
            'holder_type': self.cmb_holder.currentText(),
            'glass_type': glass_type,
            'slide_w': slide_w,
            'slide_h': slide_h,
            'slide_z': slide_z,
            'sample_count': self.inp_count.value(),
            'z_offset': self.inp_z_offset.value(),
            'extrusion_rate': self.inp_extrusion.value(),
            'nozzle_diam': self.inp_nozzle.value(),
            'print_speed': self.inp_speed.value(),
            'retraction': self.inp_retract.value(),
            'bed_temp': self.inp_bed_temp.value(),
            # --- PŘIDÁNY SKUTEČNÉ HODNOTY VÝPLNĚ ---
            'infill_style': self.cmb_infill_style.currentText(),
            'infill_val': self.inp_infill_val.value(),
            'infill_type': self.cmb_infill_type.currentText(),
            'infill_angle': self.inp_infill_angle.value()
        }

    def get_vector_params(self):
        params = self.get_all_params()
        params['margin'] = 1.5  # Okraj použitý při případném zmenšování velkých vzorků
        return params

    def set_ui_disconnected(self):
        self.btn_connect.setText("Připojit tiskárnu")
        self.btn_connect.setStyleSheet("QPushButton { background-color: #0d6efd; }")
        self.btn_start_print.hide()
        self.print_controls_widget.hide()

    def set_ui_connected(self):
        self.btn_connect.setText("Odpojit tiskárnu")
        self.btn_connect.setStyleSheet("QPushButton { background-color: #6c757d; }")
        self.btn_start_print.show()
        self.print_controls_widget.hide()

    def set_ui_printing(self):
        self.btn_start_print.hide()
        self.print_controls_widget.show()

    def _aktualizovat_limit_vzorku(self):
        params = self.get_all_params()
        
        if params['holder_type'] == "Na jeden vzorek":
            self.inp_count.setMaximum(50)
            return

        slide_w = params['slide_w']
        slide_h = params['slide_h']
        if slide_w <= 0 or slide_h <= 0: return

        from gui.settings import load_settings
        settings = load_settings()
        bed_x = settings["bed_max_x"]
        bed_y = settings["bed_max_y"]
        spacing = settings["multi_spacing"]
        start_x = settings.get("start_offset_x", 10.0)
        start_y = settings.get("start_offset_y", 10.0)

        max_count = 0
        curr_x = bed_x - start_x - slide_w
        curr_y = start_y

        while True:
            # Pokud přetečeme dozadu, jdeme doleva
            if curr_y + slide_h > bed_y and max_count > 0:
                curr_x -= (slide_w + spacing)
                curr_y = start_y

            # Pokud přetečeme vlevo mimo podložku
            if curr_x < 0: 
                break
            
            max_count += 1
            curr_y += (slide_h + spacing)

            if max_count > 500: break 

        self.inp_count.setMaximum(max(1, max_count))

    def toggle_pause(self):
        if not hasattr(self.worker, 'toggle_pause'): return
        is_paused = self.worker.toggle_pause()
        
        if is_paused:
            self.btn_pause.setText("Pokračovat")
            self.btn_pause.setStyleSheet("QPushButton { background-color: #17a2b8; color: white; }") # Modrá
        else:
            self.btn_pause.setText("Pozastavit")
            self.btn_pause.setStyleSheet("QPushButton { background-color: #ffc107; color: black; }") # Žlutá

    def _update_total_z(self):
        params = self.get_all_params()

        # Zjištění výšky držáku
        holder_type = params.get('holder_type', 'Na jeden vzorek')
        holder_z = 4.0 if holder_type == "Na jeden vzorek" else 0.0

        # Tloušťka sklíčka a uživatelský offset
        slide_z = params.get('slide_z', 1.0)
        layer_z = params.get('z_offset', 0.2)

        # Celkový součet
        total_z = holder_z + slide_z + layer_z
        self.lbl_total_z.setText(f"{total_z:.2f} mm")
--- End of content ---

## MODEL ✨

Provádím úpravu ovládání výhřevu podložky v souboru `gui/left_panel.py`. Nastavil jsem krok na 1 stupeň a upravil logiku tak, aby při přechodu z vypnutého stavu (0) hodnota skočila přímo na 30 °C, a naopak při snížení pod 30 °C se výhřev ihned vypnul.

```json
  "name": "replace",
  "args": {
    "new_string": "        self.inp_bed_temp = QSpinBox()\n        self.inp_bed_temp.setRange(0, 100)\n        self.inp_bed_temp.setSingleStep(1)\n        self.inp_bed_temp.setValue(0)\n        self._last_bed_temp = 0\n        self.inp_bed_temp.setSpecialValueText(\"vypnuto\")\n        self.inp_bed_temp.setSuffix(\" °C\")\n        self.inp_bed_temp.valueChanged.connect(self._handle_bed_temp_change)\n        self.form_layout.addRow(\"Výhřev podložky:\", self.inp_bed_temp)\n",
    "old_string": "        self.inp_bed_temp = QSpinBox()\n        self.inp_bed_temp.setRange(0, 100)\n        self.inp_bed_temp.setSingleStep(5)\n        self.inp_bed_temp.setValue(0)\n        self.inp_bed_temp.setSpecialValueText(\"vypnuto\")\n        self.inp_bed_temp.setSuffix(\" °C\")\n        self.inp_bed_temp.valueChanged.connect(self._handle_bed_temp_change)\n        self.form_layout.addRow(\"Výhřev podložky:\", self.inp_bed_temp)\n",
    "file_path": "gui/left_panel.py",
    "instruction": "Set bed temperature spinbox step to 1 and update the jump logic to strictly go from 0 to 30 and then increment by 1."

}
```

## MODEL ✨

Ovládání teploty podložky bylo opraveno:

1.  **Výchozí stav:** Hodnota 0 se nyní zobrazuje jako "vypnuto".
2.  **Krokování:** Od 30 °C výše se teplota mění po 1 stupni (30, 31, 32...).
3.  **Skok:** Pokud kliknete z "vypnuto" nahoru, hodnota skočí přímo na 30 °C. Pokud kliknete z 30 °C dolů, výhřev se ihned vypne (skočí na 0).

Máte nějaké další požadavky?

--- Content from referenced files ---
Content from @gui/left_panel.py:
from PyQt6.QtWidgets import (QWidget, QVBoxLayout, QFormLayout, QHBoxLayout, QComboBox, 
                             QSpinBox, QDoubleSpinBox, QLineEdit, QLabel, 
                             QPushButton, QFrame, QProgressBar)
from PyQt6.QtCore import pyqtSignal
from printer_com import SerialPrinterWorker
from gui.settings import load_settings
from gui.feedback_dialog import FeedbackDialog

class LeftPanel(QWidget):
    values_changed = pyqtSignal()

    def __init__(self, parent=None):
        super().__init__(parent)
        self.setFixedWidth(350)
        
        self.settings = load_settings()
        self.sklo_dims = self.settings.get("sklo_dims", {})

        main_layout = QVBoxLayout(self)
        main_layout.setContentsMargins(10, 10, 10, 10)
        
        # --- Tlačítko Načíst ---
        self.btn_load = QPushButton("Načíst vzorek (G-code/SVG/DXF)")
        main_layout.addWidget(self.btn_load)
        
        # --- Exportní tlačítka vedle sebe ---
        layout_export = QHBoxLayout()
        self.btn_save = QPushButton("Uložit G-code")
        self.btn_csv = QPushButton("Uložit CSV")
        self.btn_csv.setStyleSheet("QPushButton { background-color: #198754; } QPushButton:hover { background-color: #157347; }")
        
        layout_export.addWidget(self.btn_save)
        layout_export.addWidget(self.btn_csv)
        main_layout.addLayout(layout_export)
        
        line = QFrame()
        line.setFrameShape(QFrame.Shape.HLine)
        main_layout.addWidget(line)
        
        # HLAVNÍ FORMULÁŘ (Uloženo jako vlastnost třídy)
        self.form_layout = QFormLayout()
        
        # --- Podložka a Sklíčka ---
        self.form_layout.addRow(QLabel("<b>--- Podložka ---</b>"))
        
        self.cmb_holder = QComboBox()
        self.cmb_holder.addItems(["Na jeden vzorek", "Multiplex (více sklíček)"])
        self.form_layout.addRow("Typ držáku:", self.cmb_holder)
        
        self.cmb_glass = QComboBox()
        self.cmb_glass.addItems(list(self.sklo_dims.keys()))
        self.form_layout.addRow("Sklíčko:", self.cmb_glass)
        
        # --- Skrytý řádek pro vlastní rozměry do jednoho bloku ---
        self.widget_vlastni_sklo = QWidget()
        layout_vlastni_sklo = QHBoxLayout(self.widget_vlastni_sklo)
        layout_vlastni_sklo.setContentsMargins(0, 0, 0, 0)

        self.inp_glass_x = QLineEdit("25.0")
        self.inp_glass_y = QLineEdit("75.0")
        self.inp_glass_z = QLineEdit("2.0")

        layout_vlastni_sklo.addWidget(QLabel("Šířka:"))
        layout_vlastni_sklo.addWidget(self.inp_glass_x)
        layout_vlastni_sklo.addWidget(QLabel("Výška:"))
        layout_vlastni_sklo.addWidget(self.inp_glass_y)
        layout_vlastni_sklo.addWidget(QLabel("Tloušťka:"))
        layout_vlastni_sklo.addWidget(self.inp_glass_z)
        layout_vlastni_sklo.addWidget(QLabel("mm"))

        self.form_layout.addRow(self.widget_vlastni_sklo)
        self.widget_vlastni_sklo.setVisible(False)
        # ---------------------------------------------------------

        self.inp_count = QSpinBox()
        self.inp_count.setRange(1, 50)
        self.inp_count.setValue(1)
        self.form_layout.addRow("Počet vzorků:", self.inp_count)
        
        self.inp_bed_temp = QSpinBox()
        self.inp_bed_temp.setRange(0, 100)
        self.inp_bed_temp.setSingleStep(1)
        self.inp_bed_temp.setValue(0)
        self._last_bed_temp = 0
        self.inp_bed_temp.setSpecialValueText("vypnuto")
        self.inp_bed_temp.setSuffix(" °C")
        self.inp_bed_temp.valueChanged.connect(self._handle_bed_temp_change)
        self.form_layout.addRow("Výhřev podložky:", self.inp_bed_temp)

        # --- Parametry tisku ---
        self.form_layout.addRow(QLabel("<b>--- Tiskové parametry ---</b>"))
        
        self.inp_z_offset = QDoubleSpinBox()
        self.inp_z_offset.setRange(0.0, 5.0)
        self.inp_z_offset.setSingleStep(0.05)
        self.inp_z_offset.setValue(0.2)
        self.form_layout.addRow("Z-offset vrstvy [mm]:", self.inp_z_offset)

        self.lbl_total_z = QLabel("0.00 mm")
        self.lbl_total_z.setStyleSheet("color: #17a2b8; font-weight: bold;")
        self.form_layout.addRow("Absolutní Z tiskárny:", self.lbl_total_z)
        
        self.inp_extrusion = QDoubleSpinBox()
        self.inp_extrusion.setRange(0.001, 100.0) # Zvýšený rozsah pro mikrolitry
        self.inp_extrusion.setSingleStep(0.1)
        self.inp_extrusion.setDecimals(3)
        self.inp_extrusion.setValue(1.0) # Výchozí hodnota 1 µl/mm
        self.form_layout.addRow("Extruze [µl/mm]:", self.inp_extrusion)
        
        self.inp_nozzle = QDoubleSpinBox()
        self.inp_nozzle.setRange(0.1, 10.0)
        self.inp_nozzle.setSingleStep(0.1)
        self.inp_nozzle.setValue(0.4)
        self.form_layout.addRow("Průměr trysky [mm]:", self.inp_nozzle)

        self.inp_speed = QSpinBox()
        self.inp_speed.setRange(10, 10000)
        self.inp_speed.setSingleStep(100)
        self.inp_speed.setValue(1500)
        self.form_layout.addRow("Rychlost tisku [mm/min]:", self.inp_speed)
        
        self.inp_retract = QDoubleSpinBox()
        self.inp_retract.setRange(0.0, 50.0)
        self.inp_retract.setSingleStep(0.1)
        self.inp_retract.setValue(1.0)
        self.form_layout.addRow("Retrakce [mm]:", self.inp_retract)
        
        main_layout.addLayout(self.form_layout)
        # --- Vektorové výplně (SVG/DXF) ---
        self.form_layout.addRow(QLabel("<b>--- Vektorové výplně ---</b>"))

        self.cmb_infill_style = QComboBox()
        self.cmb_infill_style.addItems(["S okraji", "Bez okrajů", "Okraje", "Had"])
        self.form_layout.addRow("Styl výplně:", self.cmb_infill_style)

        self.widget_infill = QWidget()
        layout_infill = QHBoxLayout(self.widget_infill)
        layout_infill.setContentsMargins(0, 0, 0, 0)

        self.inp_infill_val = QDoubleSpinBox()
        self.inp_infill_val.setRange(0.1, 200.0)
        self.inp_infill_val.setValue(1.0)
        self.inp_infill_val.setSingleStep(0.1)

        self.cmb_infill_type = QComboBox()
        self.cmb_infill_type.addItems(["mm", "%"])

        layout_infill.addWidget(self.inp_infill_val)
        layout_infill.addWidget(self.cmb_infill_type)
        self.form_layout.addRow("Hustota výplně:", self.widget_infill)

        self.inp_infill_angle = QSpinBox()
        self.inp_infill_angle.setRange(0, 90)
        self.inp_infill_angle.setValue(0)
        self.form_layout.addRow("Úhel výplně [°]:", self.inp_infill_angle)
        main_layout.addStretch()

        # --- Ovládání tiskárny ---
        printer_layout = QFormLayout()
        printer_layout.addRow(QLabel("<b>--- Ovládání tiskárny ---</b>"))

        self.lbl_status = QLabel("Stav: Odpojeno")
        printer_layout.addRow(self.lbl_status)

        # --- Ovládání tiskárny ---
        self.btn_connect = QPushButton("Připojit tiskárnu")
        self.btn_connect.setStyleSheet("QPushButton { background-color: #0d6efd; }")
        main_layout.addWidget(self.btn_connect)
        
        self.btn_start_print = QPushButton("Start tisku")
        self.btn_start_print.setStyleSheet("QPushButton { background-color: #198754; }")
        self.btn_start_print.hide() # Zpočátku skryto
        main_layout.addWidget(self.btn_start_print)
        
        # Kontejner pro Pozastavit / Zastavit v jednom řádku
        self.print_controls_widget = QWidget()
        layout_print_controls = QHBoxLayout(self.print_controls_widget)
        layout_print_controls.setContentsMargins(0, 0, 0, 0)
        
        self.btn_pause = QPushButton("Pozastavit")
        self.btn_pause.setStyleSheet("QPushButton { background-color: #ffc107; color: black; }")
        
        self.btn_stop = QPushButton("Zastavit")
        self.btn_stop.setStyleSheet("QPushButton { background-color: #dc3545; }")
        
        layout_print_controls.addWidget(self.btn_pause)
        layout_print_controls.addWidget(self.btn_stop)
        self.print_controls_widget.hide() # Zpočátku skryto
        
        main_layout.addWidget(self.print_controls_widget)

        self.progress = QProgressBar()
        self.progress.setValue(0)
        printer_layout.addRow(self.progress)

        main_layout.addLayout(printer_layout)

        # --- Tlačítko Feedback (úplně dole) ---
        self.btn_feedback = QPushButton("Nahlásit chybu / Nápad")
        self.btn_feedback.setStyleSheet("QPushButton { background-color: #ffc107; color: black; } QPushButton:hover { background-color: #ffca2c; }")
        self.btn_feedback.clicked.connect(self.open_feedback)
        main_layout.addWidget(self.btn_feedback)

        # --- Propojení událostí ---
        self.cmb_holder.currentIndexChanged.connect(self._toggle_bed_heating)
        self._toggle_bed_heating() # Inicializace při startu
        self.cmb_glass.currentIndexChanged.connect(self._toggle_custom_glass)
        
        inputs = [self.cmb_holder, self.cmb_glass, self.inp_count, self.inp_bed_temp, self.inp_z_offset, 
                  self.inp_extrusion, self.inp_nozzle, self.cmb_infill_style, 
                  self.inp_infill_val, self.cmb_infill_type, self.inp_infill_angle,
                  self.inp_speed, self.inp_retract]
        for widget in inputs:
            if isinstance(widget, QComboBox):
                widget.currentIndexChanged.connect(self.values_changed.emit)
            elif isinstance(widget, (QSpinBox, QDoubleSpinBox)):
                widget.valueChanged.connect(self.values_changed.emit)
                
        line_inputs = [self.inp_glass_x, self.inp_glass_y, self.inp_glass_z]
        for widget in line_inputs:
            widget.textChanged.connect(self.values_changed.emit)

        # Inicializace stavu zobrazení skla při zapnutí
        self._toggle_custom_glass()

        # --- Inicializace vlákna ---
        self.worker = SerialPrinterWorker()
        self.worker.status_changed.connect(self.update_status)
        self.worker.progress_changed.connect(self.progress.setValue)

        self.btn_connect.clicked.connect(self.toggle_connection)
        self.btn_stop.clicked.connect(self.stop_print)
        self.btn_pause.clicked.connect(self.toggle_pause)
        # --- Omezení maximálního počtu vzorků ---
        self.values_changed.connect(self._aktualizovat_limit_vzorku)
        self.values_changed.connect(self._update_total_z)
        self._aktualizovat_limit_vzorku() # Prvotní výpočet při startu
        self._update_total_z()

    def _toggle_custom_glass(self):
        is_custom = self.cmb_glass.currentText() == "Vlastní"
        self.widget_vlastni_sklo.setVisible(is_custom)
        self.values_changed.emit()
        
    def _toggle_bed_heating(self):
        is_multiplex = self.cmb_holder.currentText() == "Multiplex (více sklíček)"
        self.inp_bed_temp.setVisible(is_multiplex)
        label = self.form_layout.labelForField(self.inp_bed_temp)
        if label:
            label.setVisible(is_multiplex)
            
        if not is_multiplex:
            self.inp_bed_temp.setValue(0)
            
    def _handle_bed_temp_change(self, val):
        # Pokud se uživatel snaží jít z 0 nahoru (na 1) nebo z 30 dolů (na 29)
        if 0 < val < 30:
            self.inp_bed_temp.blockSignals(True)
            if val > getattr(self, '_last_bed_temp', 0): # Šli jsme nahoru z 0
                self.inp_bed_temp.setValue(30)
            else: # Šli jsme dolů z 30
                self.inp_bed_temp.setValue(0)
            self.inp_bed_temp.blockSignals(False)
            
        self._last_bed_temp = self.inp_bed_temp.value()
        self.values_changed.emit()
            
    def update_status(self, msg):
        self.lbl_status.setText(f"Stav: {msg}")

        if msg == "Připojeno":
            self.lbl_status.setStyleSheet("color: #198754; font-weight: bold;")
            self.set_ui_connected()

        elif msg in ("Tisk dokončen", "Tisk zrušen"):
            # Tiskárna je stále připojená, jen skončil tisk (vrátíme tlačítko Start)
            self.lbl_status.setStyleSheet("color: #198754; font-weight: bold;")
            self.set_ui_connected()

        elif "Chyba" in msg or msg == "Odpojeno":
            # Při odpojení nebo chybě linky schováme ovládání tisku
            self.lbl_status.setStyleSheet("color: #dc3545; font-weight: bold;")
            self.set_ui_disconnected()
            
    def toggle_connection(self):
        if self.worker.serial_conn and self.worker.serial_conn.is_open:
            self.worker.stop()
        else:
            self.worker.connect_printer()

    def open_feedback(self):
        dialog = FeedbackDialog(self)
        dialog.exec()

    def stop_print(self):
        self.worker.stop()
        self.progress.setValue(0)
        self.set_ui_connected()

    def get_all_params(self):
        glass_type = self.cmb_glass.currentText()
        if glass_type == "Vlastní":
            try:
                slide_w = float(self.inp_glass_x.text())
                slide_h = float(self.inp_glass_y.text())
                slide_z = float(self.inp_glass_z.text())
            except ValueError:
                slide_w, slide_h, slide_z = 25.0, 75.0, 1.0
        else:
            slide_w, slide_h, slide_z = self.sklo_dims.get(glass_type, [25.0, 75.0, 1.0])

        return {
            'holder_type': self.cmb_holder.currentText(),
            'glass_type': glass_type,
            'slide_w': slide_w,
            'slide_h': slide_h,
            'slide_z': slide_z,
            'sample_count': self.inp_count.value(),
            'z_offset': self.inp_z_offset.value(),
            'extrusion_rate': self.inp_extrusion.value(),
            'nozzle_diam': self.inp_nozzle.value(),
            'print_speed': self.inp_speed.value(),
            'retraction': self.inp_retract.value(),
            'bed_temp': self.inp_bed_temp.value(),
            # --- PŘIDÁNY SKUTEČNÉ HODNOTY VÝPLNĚ ---
            'infill_style': self.cmb_infill_style.currentText(),
            'infill_val': self.inp_infill_val.value(),
            'infill_type': self.cmb_infill_type.currentText(),
            'infill_angle': self.inp_infill_angle.value()
        }

    def get_vector_params(self):
        params = self.get_all_params()
        params['margin'] = 1.5  # Okraj použitý při případném zmenšování velkých vzorků
        return params

    def set_ui_disconnected(self):
        self.btn_connect.setText("Připojit tiskárnu")
        self.btn_connect.setStyleSheet("QPushButton { background-color: #0d6efd; }")
        self.btn_start_print.hide()
        self.print_controls_widget.hide()

    def set_ui_connected(self):
        self.btn_connect.setText("Odpojit tiskárnu")
        self.btn_connect.setStyleSheet("QPushButton { background-color: #6c757d; }")
        self.btn_start_print.show()
        self.print_controls_widget.hide()

    def set_ui_printing(self):
        self.btn_start_print.hide()
        self.print_controls_widget.show()

    def _aktualizovat_limit_vzorku(self):
        params = self.get_all_params()
        
        if params['holder_type'] == "Na jeden vzorek":
            self.inp_count.setMaximum(50)
            return

        slide_w = params['slide_w']
        slide_h = params['slide_h']
        if slide_w <= 0 or slide_h <= 0: return

        from gui.settings import load_settings
        settings = load_settings()
        bed_x = settings["bed_max_x"]
        bed_y = settings["bed_max_y"]
        spacing = settings["multi_spacing"]
        start_x = settings.get("start_offset_x", 10.0)
        start_y = settings.get("start_offset_y", 10.0)

        max_count = 0
        curr_x = bed_x - start_x - slide_w
        curr_y = start_y

        while True:
            # Pokud přetečeme dozadu, jdeme doleva
            if curr_y + slide_h > bed_y and max_count > 0:
                curr_x -= (slide_w + spacing)
                curr_y = start_y

            # Pokud přetečeme vlevo mimo podložku
            if curr_x < 0: 
                break
            
            max_count += 1
            curr_y += (slide_h + spacing)

            if max_count > 500: break 

        self.inp_count.setMaximum(max(1, max_count))

    def toggle_pause(self):
        if not hasattr(self.worker, 'toggle_pause'): return
        is_paused = self.worker.toggle_pause()
        
        if is_paused:
            self.btn_pause.setText("Pokračovat")
            self.btn_pause.setStyleSheet("QPushButton { background-color: #17a2b8; color: white; }") # Modrá
        else:
            self.btn_pause.setText("Pozastavit")
            self.btn_pause.setStyleSheet("QPushButton { background-color: #ffc107; color: black; }") # Žlutá

    def _update_total_z(self):
        params = self.get_all_params()

        # Zjištění výšky držáku
        holder_type = params.get('holder_type', 'Na jeden vzorek')
        holder_z = 4.0 if holder_type == "Na jeden vzorek" else 0.0

        # Tloušťka sklíčka a uživatelský offset
        slide_z = params.get('slide_z', 1.0)
        layer_z = params.get('z_offset', 0.2)

        # Celkový součet
        total_z = holder_z + slide_z + layer_z
        self.lbl_total_z.setText(f"{total_z:.2f} mm")
Content from @gui/settings.py:
import json
import os
import shutil
from PyQt6.QtWidgets import (QDialog, QVBoxLayout, QTabWidget, QWidget, 
                             QFormLayout, QTextEdit, QPushButton, QHBoxLayout, 
                             QDoubleSpinBox, QLabel, QMessageBox)

SETTINGS_FILE = os.path.join(os.getcwd(), "settings.json")
DEFAULT_SETTINGS_FILE = os.path.join(os.getcwd(), "settings_default.json")

def load_settings():
    """Načte nastavení ze souborů s prioritou na uživatelské hodnoty."""
    defaults = {}
    if os.path.exists(DEFAULT_SETTINGS_FILE):
        try:
            with open(DEFAULT_SETTINGS_FILE, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                defaults = json.load(f)
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"Chyba při čtení default nastavení: {e}")

    if os.path.exists(SETTINGS_FILE):
        try:
            with open(SETTINGS_FILE, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                user_settings = json.load(f)
                for key, value in defaults.items():
                    if key not in user_settings:
                        user_settings[key] = value
                return user_settings
        except json.JSONDecodeError:
            pass

    return defaults

def save_settings(settings_data):
    with open(SETTINGS_FILE, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        json.dump(settings_data, f, indent=4)

def restore_default_settings():
    if os.path.exists(DEFAULT_SETTINGS_FILE):
        shutil.copy(DEFAULT_SETTINGS_FILE, SETTINGS_FILE)

class SettingsDialog(QDialog):
    def __init__(self, parent=None):
        super().__init__(parent)
        self.setWindowTitle("Pokročilé nastavení aplikace")
        self.resize(500, 600)
        self.settings = load_settings()

        layout = QVBoxLayout(self)
        tabs = QTabWidget()

        # --- ZÁLOŽKA 1: Hardware a rozměry ---
        tab_hw = QWidget()
        lay_hw = QFormLayout(tab_hw)

        self.inp_bed_x = QDoubleSpinBox()
        self.inp_bed_x.setRange(50, 1000)
        self.inp_bed_x.setValue(self.settings.get("bed_max_x", 250.0))

        self.inp_bed_y = QDoubleSpinBox()
        self.inp_bed_y.setRange(50, 1000)
        self.inp_bed_y.setValue(self.settings.get("bed_max_y", 210.0))
        
        # PŘIDÁNO: Odsazení od okrajů
        self.inp_start_x = QDoubleSpinBox()
        self.inp_start_x.setRange(0, 100)
        self.inp_start_x.setValue(self.settings.get("start_offset_x", 10.0))
        
        self.inp_start_y = QDoubleSpinBox()
        self.inp_start_y.setRange(0, 100)
        self.inp_start_y.setValue(self.settings.get("start_offset_y", 10.0))

        self.inp_spacing = QDoubleSpinBox()
        self.inp_spacing.setRange(0, 50)
        self.inp_spacing.setValue(self.settings.get("multi_spacing", 5.0))

        lay_hw.addRow("Max šířka podložky (X) [mm]:", self.inp_bed_x)
        lay_hw.addRow("Max hloubka podložky (Y) [mm]:", self.inp_bed_y)
        lay_hw.addRow("Odsazení vzorku (X okraj) [mm]:", self.inp_start_x)
        lay_hw.addRow("Odsazení vzorku (Y okraj) [mm]:", self.inp_start_y)
        lay_hw.addRow("Mezera mezi sklíčky [mm]:", self.inp_spacing)
        tabs.addTab(tab_hw, "Hardware")

        # --- ZÁLOŽKA 2: Vlastní G-code ---
        # --- ZÁLOŽKA 2: Vlastní G-code ---
        tab_gcode = QWidget()
        lay_gcode = QVBoxLayout(tab_gcode)

        lay_gcode.addWidget(QLabel("<b>Hlavní startovací G-code:</b>"))
        self.txt_start = QTextEdit()
        self.txt_start.setPlainText(self.settings.get("start_gcode", "").replace('\\n', '\n'))
        lay_gcode.addWidget(self.txt_start)

        lay_gcode.addWidget(QLabel("<b>Před každým sklíčkem (Smyčka Start):</b>"))
        self.txt_loop_start = QTextEdit()
        self.txt_loop_start.setPlainText(self.settings.get("loop_start_gcode", "").replace('\\n', '\n'))
        lay_gcode.addWidget(self.txt_loop_start)

        lay_gcode.addWidget(QLabel("<b>Za každým sklíčkem (Smyčka Konec):</b>"))
        self.txt_loop_end = QTextEdit()
        self.txt_loop_end.setPlainText(self.settings.get("loop_end_gcode", "").replace('\\n', '\n'))
        lay_gcode.addWidget(self.txt_loop_end)

        lay_gcode.addWidget(QLabel("<b>Ukončovací G-code (Úplný konec):</b>"))
        self.txt_end = QTextEdit()
        self.txt_end.setPlainText(self.settings.get("end_gcode", "").replace('\\n', '\n'))
        lay_gcode.addWidget(self.txt_end)
        
        tabs.addTab(tab_gcode, "G-code Skripty")
        layout.addWidget(tabs)

        # --- Tlačítka uložení ---
        btn_layout = QHBoxLayout()
        
        btn_restore = QPushButton("Obnovit výchozí")
        btn_restore.setStyleSheet("QPushButton { background-color: #dc3545; color: white; font-weight: bold; }")
        btn_restore.clicked.connect(self.restore_defaults)
        
        btn_save = QPushButton("Uložit a zavřít")
        btn_save.setStyleSheet("QPushButton { background-color: #0d6efd; color: white; font-weight: bold; }")
        btn_save.clicked.connect(self.save_and_close)
        
        btn_cancel = QPushButton("Zrušit")
        btn_cancel.clicked.connect(self.reject)
        
        btn_layout.addWidget(btn_restore)
        btn_layout.addStretch()
        btn_layout.addWidget(btn_cancel)
        btn_layout.addWidget(btn_save)
        layout.addLayout(btn_layout)

    def restore_defaults(self):
        odpoved = QMessageBox.question(self, "Obnovit výchozí", "Opravdu chcete přepsat všechna nastavení na výchozí hodnoty?", QMessageBox.StandardButton.Yes | QMessageBox.StandardButton.No)
        if odpoved == QMessageBox.StandardButton.Yes:
            restore_default_settings()
            self.settings = load_settings()
            
            # PŘIDÁNO: Aktualizace hodnot v políčkách
            self.inp_bed_x.setValue(self.settings.get("bed_max_x", 250.0))
            self.inp_bed_y.setValue(self.settings.get("bed_max_y", 210.0))
            self.inp_start_x.setValue(self.settings.get("start_offset_x", 10.0))
            self.inp_start_y.setValue(self.settings.get("start_offset_y", 10.0))
            self.inp_spacing.setValue(self.settings.get("multi_spacing", 5.0))
            self.txt_start.setPlainText(self.settings.get("start_gcode", "").replace('\\n', '\n'))
            self.txt_loop_start.setPlainText(self.settings.get("loop_start_gcode", "").replace('\\n', '\n'))
            self.txt_loop_end.setPlainText(self.settings.get("loop_end_gcode", "").replace('\\n', '\n'))
            self.txt_end.setPlainText(self.settings.get("end_gcode", "").replace('\\n', '\n'))

    def save_and_close(self):
        self.settings["bed_max_x"] = self.inp_bed_x.value()
        self.settings["bed_max_y"] = self.inp_bed_y.value()
        # PŘIDÁNO: Uložení odsazení do settings.json
        self.settings["start_offset_x"] = self.inp_start_x.value()
        self.settings["start_offset_y"] = self.inp_start_y.value()
        self.settings["multi_spacing"] = self.inp_spacing.value()
        self.settings["start_gcode"] = self.txt_start.toPlainText()
        self.settings["end_gcode"] = self.txt_end.toPlainText()
        self.settings["loop_start_gcode"] = self.txt_loop_start.toPlainText()
        self.settings["loop_end_gcode"] = self.txt_loop_end.toPlainText()

        save_settings(self.settings)
            
        QMessageBox.information(self, "Uloženo", "Nastavení bylo úspěšně uloženo.")
        self.accept()

```json
    "old_string": "        tabs.addTab(tab_gcode, \"G-code Skripty\")\n        layout.addWidget(tabs)\n",
    "instruction": "Add a new tab for nozzle definitions in the settings dialog. It should allow editing of heights and diameters for the defined nozzles.",
    "new_string": "        tabs.addTab(tab_gcode, \"G-code Skripty\")\n\n        # --- ZÁLOŽKA 3: Trysky ---\n        tab_nozzles = QWidget()\n        lay_nozzles = QVBoxLayout(tab_nozzles)\n        lay_nozzles.addWidget(QLabel(\"<b>Definice trysek (Výška x Průměr ústí):</b>\"))\n        \n        self.nozzle_widgets = {}\n        nozzle_form = QFormLayout()\n        \n        nozzle_defs = self.settings.get(\"nozzle_defs\", {})\n        for name, params in nozzle_defs.items():\n            if name == \"Vlastní\": continue # Vlastní se definuje v hlavním panelu\n            \n            w_box = QWidget()\n            w_lay = QHBoxLayout(w_box)\n            w_lay.setContentsMargins(0,0,0,0)\n            \n            inp_h = QDoubleSpinBox()\n            inp_h.setRange(0, 100)\n            inp_h.setDecimals(2)\n            inp_h.setValue(params[0])\n            inp_h.setSuffix(\" mm\")\n            \n            inp_d = QDoubleSpinBox()\n            inp_d.setRange(0.01, 10)\n            inp_d.setDecimals(3)\n            inp_d.setValue(params[1])\n            inp_d.setSuffix(\" mm\")\n            \n            w_lay.addWidget(QLabel(\"Výška:\"))\n            w_lay.addWidget(inp_h)\n            w_lay.addWidget(QLabel(\"Průměr:\"))\n            w_lay.addWidget(inp_d)\n            \n            nozzle_form.addRow(f\"{name}:\", w_box)\n            self.nozzle_widgets[name] = (inp_h, inp_d)\n            \n        lay_nozzles.addLayout(nozzle_form)\n        lay_nozzles.addStretch()\n        tabs.addTab(tab_nozzles, \"Trysky\")\n        \n        layout.addWidget(tabs)\n"
  }
}
```

For example, to read the next section of the file, use start_line: 251.\n\n--- FILE CONTENT (truncated) ---\nfrom PyQt6.QtWidgets import (QWidget, QVBoxLayout, QFormLayout, QHBoxLayout, QComboBox, \n                             QSpinBox, QDoubleSpinBox, QLineEdit, QLabel, \n                             QPushButton, QFrame, QProgressBar)\nfrom PyQt6.QtCore import pyqtSignal\nfrom printer_com import SerialPrinterWorker\nfrom gui.settings import load_settings\nfrom gui.feedback_dialog import FeedbackDialog\n\nclass LeftPanel(QWidget):\n    values_changed = pyqtSignal()\n\n    def __init__(self, parent=None):\n        super().__init__(parent)\n        self.setFixedWidth(350)\n        \n        self.settings = load_settings()\n        self.sklo_dims = self.settings.get(\"sklo_dims\", {})\n\n        main_layout = QVBoxLayout(self)\n        main_layout.setContentsMargins(10, 10, 10, 10)\n        \n        # --- Tlačítko Načíst ---\n        self.btn_load = QPushButton(\"Načíst vzorek (G-code/SVG/DXF)\")\n        main_layout.addWidget(self.btn_load)\n        \n        # --- Exportní tlačítka vedle sebe ---\n        layout_export = QHBoxLayout()\n        self.btn_save = QPushButton(\"Uložit G-code\")\n        self.btn_csv = QPushButton(\"Uložit CSV\")\n        self.btn_csv.setStyleSheet(\"QPushButton { background-color: #198754; } QPushButton:hover { background-color: #157347; }\")\n        \n        layout_export.addWidget(self.btn_save)\n        layout_export.addWidget(self.btn_csv)\n        main_layout.addLayout(layout_export)\n        \n        line = QFrame()\n        line.setFrameShape(QFrame.Shape.HLine)\n        main_layout.addWidget(line)\n        \n        # HLAVNÍ FORMULÁŘ (Uloženo jako vlastnost třídy)\n        self.form_layout = QFormLayout()\n        \n        # --- Podložka a Sklíčka ---\n        self.form_layout.addRow(QLabel(\"<b>--- Podložka ---</b>\"))\n        \n        self.cmb_holder = QComboBox()\n        self.cmb_holder.addItems([\"Na jeden vzorek\", \"Multiplex (více sklíček)\"])\n        self.form_layout.addRow(\"Typ držáku:\", self.cmb_holder)\n        \n        self.cmb_glass = QComboBox()\n        self.cmb_glass.addItems(list(self.sklo_dims.keys()))\n        self.form_layout.addRow(\"Sklíčko:\", self.cmb_glass)\n        \n        # --- Skrytý řádek pro vlastní rozměry do jednoho bloku ---\n        self.widget_vlastni_sklo = QWidget()\n        layout_vlastni_sklo = QHBoxLayout(self.widget_vlastni_sklo)\n        layout_vlastni_sklo.setContentsMargins(0, 0, 0, 0)\n\n        self.inp_glass_x = QLineEdit(\"25.0\")\n        self.inp_glass_y = QLineEdit(\"75.0\")\n        self.inp_glass_z = QLineEdit(\"2.0\")\n\n        layout_vlastni_sklo.addWidget(QLabel(\"Šířka:\"))\n        layout_vlastni_sklo.addWidget(self.inp_glass_x)\n        layout_vlastni_sklo.addWidget(QLabel(\"Výška:\"))\n        layout_vlastni_sklo.addWidget(self.inp_glass_y)\n        layout_vlastni_sklo.addWidget(QLabel(\"Tloušťka:\"))\n        layout_vlastni_sklo.addWidget(self.inp_glass_z)\n        layout_vlastni_sklo.addWidget(QLabel(\"mm\"))\n\n        self.form_layout.addRow(self.widget_vlastni_sklo)\n        self.widget_vlastni_sklo.setVisible(False)\n        # ---------------------------------------------------------\n\n        self.inp_count = QSpinBox()\n        self.inp_count.setRange(1, 50)\n        self.inp_count.setValue(1)\n        self.form_layout.addRow(\"Počet vzorků:\", self.inp_count)\n        \n        self.inp_bed_temp = QSpinBox()\n        self.inp_bed_temp.setRange(0, 100)\n        self.inp_bed_temp.setSingleStep(1)\n        self.inp_bed_temp.setValue(0)\n        self._last_bed_temp = 0\n        self.inp_bed_temp.setSpecialValueText(\"vypnuto\")\n        self.inp_bed_temp.setSuffix(\" °C\")\n        self.inp_bed_temp.valueChanged.connect(self._handle_bed_temp_change)\n        self.form_layout.addRow(\"Výhřev podložky:\", self.inp_bed_temp)\n\n        # --- Parametry tisku ---\n        self.form_layout.addRow(QLabel(\"<b>--- Tiskové parametry ---</b>\"))\n        \n        self.inp_z_offset = QDoubleSpinBox()\n        self.inp_z_offset.setRange(0.0, 5.0)\n        self.inp_z_offset.setSingleStep(0.05)\n        self.inp_z_offset.setValue(0.2)\n        self.form_layout.addRow(\"Z-offset vrstvy [mm]:\", self.inp_z_offset)\n\n        self.lbl_total_z = QLabel(\"0.00 mm\")\n        self.lbl_total_z.setStyleSheet(\"color: #17a2b8; font-weight: bold;\")\n        self.form_layout.addRow(\"Absolutní Z tiskárny:\", self.lbl_total_z)\n        \n        self.inp_extrusion = QDoubleSpinBox()\n        self.inp_extrusion.setRange(0.001, 100.0) # Zvýšený rozsah pro mikrolitry\n        self.inp_extrusion.setSingleStep(0.1)\n        self.inp_extrusion.setDecimals(3)\n        self.inp_extrusion.setValue(1.0) # Výchozí hodnota 1 µl/mm\n        self.form_layout.addRow(\"Extruze [µl/mm]:\", self.inp_extrusion)\n        \n        self.inp_nozzle = QDoubleSpinBox()\n        self.inp_nozzle.setRange(0.1, 10.0)\n        self.inp_nozzle.setSingleStep(0.1)\n        self.inp_nozzle.setValue(0.4)\n        self.form_layout.addRow(\"Průměr trysky [mm]:\", self.inp_nozzle)\n\n        self.inp_speed = QSpinBox()\n        self.inp_speed.setRange(10, 10000)\n        self.inp_speed.setSingleStep(100)\n        self.inp_speed.setValue(1500)\n        self.form_layout.addRow(\"Rychlost tisku [mm/min]:\", self.inp_speed)\n        \n        self.inp_retract = QDoubleSpinBox()\n        self.inp_retract.setRange(0.0, 50.0)\n        self.inp_retract.setSingleStep(0.1)\n        self.inp_retract.setValue(1.0)\n        self.form_layout.addRow(\"Retrakce [mm]:\", self.inp_retract)\n        \n        main_layout.addLayout(self.form_layout)\n        # --- Vektorové výplně (SVG/DXF) ---\n        self.form_layout.addRow(QLabel(\"<b>--- Vektorové výplně ---</b>\"))\n\n        self.cmb_infill_style = QComboBox()\n        self.cmb_infill_style.addItems([\"S okraji\", \"Bez okrajů\", \"Okraje\", \"Had\"])\n        self.form_layout.addRow(\"Styl výplně:\", self.cmb_infill_style)\n\n        self.widget_infill = QWidget()\n        layout_infill = QHBoxLayout(self.widget_infill)\n        layout_infill.setContentsMargins(0, 0, 0, 0)\n\n        self.inp_infill_val = QDoubleSpinBox()\n        self.inp_infill_val.setRange(0.1, 200.0)\n        self.inp_infill_val.setValue(1.0)\n        self.inp_infill_val.setSingleStep(0.1)\n\n        self.cmb_infill_type = QComboBox()\n        self.cmb_infill_type.addItems([\"mm\", \"%\"])\n\n        layout_infill.addWidget(self.inp_infill_val)\n        layout_infill.addWidget(self.cmb_infill_type)\n        self.form_layout.addRow(\"Hustota výplně:\", self.widget_infill)\n\n        self.inp_infill_angle = QSpinBox()\n        self.inp_infill_angle.setRange(0, 90)\n        self.inp_infill_angle.setValue(0)\n        self.form_layout.addRow(\"Úhel výplně [°]:\", self.inp_infill_angle)\n        main_layout.addStretch()\n\n        # --- Ovládání tiskárny ---\n        printer_layout = QFormLayout()\n        printer_layout.addRow(QLabel(\"<b>--- Ovládání tiskárny ---</b>\"))\n\n        self.lbl_status = QLabel(\"Stav: Odpojeno\")\n        printer_layout.addRow(self.lbl_status)\n\n        # --- Ovládání tiskárny ---\n        self.btn_connect = QPushButton(\"Připojit tiskárnu\")\n        self.btn_connect.setStyleSheet(\"QPushButton { background-color: #0d6efd; }\")\n        main_layout.addWidget(self.btn_connect)\n        \n        self.btn_start_print = QPushButton(\"Start tisku\")\n        self.btn_start_print.setStyleSheet(\"QPushButton { background-color: #198754; }\")\n        self.btn_start_print.hide() # Zpočátku skryto\n        main_layout.addWidget(self.btn_start_print)\n        \n        # Kontejner pro Pozastavit / Zastavit v jednom řádku\n        self.print_controls_widget = QWidget()\n        layout_print_controls = QHBoxLayout(self.print_controls_widget)\n        layout_print_controls.setContentsMargins(0, 0, 0, 0)\n        \n        self.btn_pause = QPushButton(\"Pozastavit\")\n        self.btn_pause.setStyleSheet(\"QPushButton { background-color: #ffc107; color: black; }\")\n        \n        self.btn_stop = QPushButton(\"Zastavit\")\n        self.btn_stop.setStyleSheet(\"QPushButton { background-color: #dc3545; }\")\n        \n        layout_print_controls.addWidget(self.btn_pause)\n        layout_print_controls.addWidget(self.btn_stop)\n        self.print_controls_widget.hide() # Zpočátku skryto\n        \n        main_layout.addWidget(self.print_controls_widget)\n\n        self.progress = QProgressBar()\n        self.progress.setValue(0)\n        printer_layout.addRow(self.progress)\n\n        main_layout.addLayout(printer_layout)\n\n        # --- Tlačítko Feedback (úplně dole) ---\n        self.btn_feedback = QPushButton(\"Nahlásit chybu / Nápad\")\n        self.btn_feedback.setStyleSheet(\"QPushButton { background-color: #ffc107; color: black; } QPushButton:hover { background-color: #ffca2c; }\")\n        self.btn_feedback.clicked.connect(self.open_feedback)\n        main_layout.addWidget(self.btn_feedback)\n\n        # --- Propojení událostí ---\n        self.cmb_holder.currentIndexChanged.connect(self._toggle_bed_heating)\n        self._toggle_bed_heating() # Inicializace při startu\n        self.cmb_glass.currentIndexChanged.connect(self._toggle_custom_glass)\n        \n        inputs = [self.cmb_holder, self.cmb_glass, self.inp_count, self.inp_bed_temp, self.inp_z_offset, \n                  self.inp_extrusion, self.inp_nozzle, self.cmb_infill_style, \n                  self.inp_infill_val, self.cmb_infill_type, self.inp_infill_angle,\n                  self.inp_speed, self.inp_retract]\n        for widget in inputs:\n            if isinstance(widget, QComboBox):\n                widget.currentIndexChanged.connect(self.values_changed.emit)\n            elif isinstance(widget, (QSpinBox, QDoubleSpinBox)):\n                widget.valueChanged.connect(self.values_changed.emit)\n                \n        line_inputs = [self.inp_glass_x, self.inp_glass_y, self.inp_glass_z]\n        for widget in line_inputs:\n            widget.textChanged.connect(self.values_changed.emit)\n\n        # Inicializace stavu zobrazení skla při zapnutí\n        self._toggle_custom_glass()\n\n        # --- Inicializace vlákna ---\n        self.worker = SerialPrinterWorker()\n        self.worker.status_changed.connect(self.update_status)\n        self.worker.progress_changed.connect(self.progress.setValue)\n\n        self.btn_connect.clicked.connect(self.toggle_connection)\n        self.btn_stop.clicked.connect(self.stop_print)\n        self.btn_pause.clicked.connect(self.toggle_pause)\n        # --- Omezení maximálního počtu vzorků ---\n        self.values_changed.connect(self._aktualizovat_limit_vzorku)\n        self.values_changed.connect(self._update_total_z)\n        self._aktualizovat_limit_vzorku() # Prvotní výpočet při startu\n        self._update_total_z()\n\n    def _toggle_custom_glass(self):\n        is_custom = self.cmb_glass.currentText() == \"Vlastní\"\n        self.widget_vlastni_sklo.setVisible(is_custom)\n        self.values_changed.emit()\n        \n    def _toggle_bed_heating(self):\n        is_multiplex = self.cmb_holder.currentText() == \"Multiplex (více sklíček)\"\n        self.inp_bed_temp.setVisible(is_multiplex)\n        label = self.form_layout.labelForField(self.inp_bed_temp)\n        if label:\n            label.setVisible(is_multiplex)"
```json
  }
}
```

```json
{
  "name": "replace",
  "args": {
    "new_string": "    def _toggle_custom_glass(self):\n        is_custom = self.cmb_glass.currentText() == \"Vlastní\"\n        self.widget_vlastni_sklo.setVisible(is_custom)\n        self.values_changed.emit()\n        \n    def _toggle_custom_nozzle(self):\n        is_custom = self.cmb_nozzle.currentText() == \"Vlastní\"\n        self.widget_vlastni_tryska.setVisible(is_custom)\n        self.values_changed.emit()\n        \n    def _toggle_bed_heating(self):\n...\n    def get_all_params(self):\n        glass_type = self.cmb_glass.currentText()\n        if glass_type == \"Vlastní\":\n            try:\n                slide_w = float(self.inp_glass_x.text())\n                slide_h = float(self.inp_glass_y.text())\n                slide_z = float(self.inp_glass_z.text())\n            except ValueError:\n                slide_w, slide_h, slide_z = 25.0, 75.0, 1.0\n        else:\n            slide_w, slide_h, slide_z = self.sklo_dims.get(glass_type, [25.0, 75.0, 1.0])\n\n        nozzle_type = self.cmb_nozzle.currentText()\n        if nozzle_type == \"Vlastní\":\n            nozzle_h = self.inp_nozzle_h.value()\n            nozzle_d = self.inp_nozzle_d.value()\n        else:\n            nozzle_h, nozzle_d = self.nozzle_defs.get(nozzle_type, [30.0, 0.4])\n\n        return {\n            'holder_type': self.cmb_holder.currentText(),\n            'glass_type': glass_type,\n            'slide_w': slide_w,\n            'slide_h': slide_h,\n            'slide_z': slide_z,\n            'sample_count': self.inp_count.value(),\n            'z_offset': self.inp_z_offset.value(),\n            'extrusion_rate': self.inp_extrusion.value(),\n            'nozzle_diam': nozzle_d,\n            'nozzle_height': nozzle_h,\n            'print_speed': self.inp_speed.value(),\n            'retraction': self.inp_retract.value(),\n            'bed_temp': self.inp_bed_temp.value(),\n...\n    def _update_total_z(self):\n        params = self.get_all_params()\n\n        # Zjištění výšky držáku\n        holder_type = params.get('holder_type', 'Na jeden vzorek')\n        holder_z = 4.0 if holder_type == \"Na jeden vzorek\" else 0.0\n\n        # Tloušťka sklíčka a uživatelský offset\n        slide_z = params.get('slide_z', 1.0)\n        layer_z = params.get('z_offset', 0.2)\n        \n        # Výška trysky\n        nozzle_h = params.get('nozzle_height', 30.0)\n\n        # Celkový součet\n        total_z = holder_z + slide_z + layer_z + nozzle_h\n        self.lbl_total_z.setText(f\"{total_z:.2f} mm\")\n",
    "file_path": "gui/left_panel.py",
    "instruction": "Add _toggle_custom_nozzle method. Update get_all_params to return diameter and height based on nozzle selection. Update _update_total_z to use nozzle height.",
    "old_string": "    def _toggle_custom_glass(self):\n        is_custom = self.cmb_glass.currentText() == \"Vlastní\"\n        self.widget_vlastni_sklo.setVisible(is_custom)\n        self.values_changed.emit()\n        \n    def _toggle_bed_heating(self):\n...\n    def get_all_params(self):\n        glass_type = self.cmb_glass.currentText()\n        if glass_type == \"Vlastní\":\n            try:\n                slide_w = float(self.inp_glass_x.text())\n                slide_h = float(self.inp_glass_y.text())\n                slide_z = float(self.inp_glass_z.text())\n            except ValueError:\n                slide_w, slide_h, slide_z = 25.0, 75.0, 1.0\n        else:\n            slide_w, slide_h, slide_z = self.sklo_dims.get(glass_type, [25.0, 75.0, 1.0])\n\n        return {\n            'holder_type': self.cmb_holder.currentText(),\n            'glass_type': glass_type,\n            'slide_w': slide_w,\n            'slide_h': slide_h,\n            'slide_z': slide_z,\n            'sample_count': self.inp_count.value(),\n            'z_offset': self.inp_z_offset.value(),\n            'extrusion_rate': self.inp_extrusion.value(),\n            'nozzle_diam': self.inp_nozzle.value(),\n            'print_speed': self.inp_speed.value(),\n            'retraction': self.inp_retract.value(),\n            'bed_temp': self.inp_bed_temp.value(),\n...\n    def _update_total_z(self):\n        params = self.get_all_params()\n\n        # Zjištění výšky držáku\n        holder_type = params.get('holder_type', 'Na jeden vzorek')\n        holder_z = 4.0 if holder_type == \"Na jeden vzorek\" else 0.0\n\n        # Tloušťka sklíčka a uživatelský offset\n        slide_z = params.get('slide_z', 1.0)\n        layer_z = params.get('z_offset', 0.2)\n\n        # Celkový součet\n        total_z = holder_z + slide_z + layer_z\n        self.lbl_total_z.setText(f\"{total_z:.2f} mm\")\n"
  }
}
```

For example, to read the next section of the file, use start_line: 281.\n\n--- FILE CONTENT (truncated) ---\n        self._toggle_custom_glass()\n        self._toggle_custom_nozzle()\n\n        # --- Inicializace vlákna ---\n        self.worker = SerialPrinterWorker()\n        self.worker.status_changed.connect(self.update_status)\n        self.worker.progress_changed.connect(self.progress.setValue)\n\n        self.btn_connect.clicked.connect(self.toggle_connection)\n        self.btn_stop.clicked.connect(self.stop_print)\n        self.btn_pause.clicked.connect(self.toggle_pause)\n        # --- Omezení maximálního počtu vzorků ---\n        self.values_changed.connect(self._aktualizovat_limit_vzorku)\n        self.values_changed.connect(self._update_total_z)\n        self._aktualizovat_limit_vzorku() # Prvotní výpočet při startu\n        self._update_total_z()\n\n    def _toggle_custom_glass(self):\n        is_custom = self.cmb_glass.currentText() == \"Vlastní\"\n        self.widget_vlastni_sklo.setVisible(is_custom)\n        self.values_changed.emit()\n        \n    def _toggle_custom_nozzle(self):\n        is_custom = self.cmb_nozzle.currentText() == \"Vlastní\"\n        self.widget_vlastni_tryska.setVisible(is_custom)\n        self.values_changed.emit()\n        \n    def _toggle_bed_heating(self):\n        is_multiplex = self.cmb_holder.currentText() == \"Multiplex (více sklíček)\"\n        self.inp_bed_temp.setVisible(is_multiplex)\n        label = self.form_layout.labelForField(self.inp_bed_temp)\n        if label:\n            label.setVisible(is_multiplex)\n            \n        if not is_multiplex:\n            self.inp_bed_temp.setValue(0)\n            \n    def _handle_bed_temp_change(self, val):\n        # Pokud se uživatel snaží jít z 0 nahoru (na 1) nebo z 30 dolů (na 29)\n        if 0 < val < 30:\n            self.inp_bed_temp.blockSignals(True)"

For example, to read the next section of the file, use start_line: 371.\n\n--- FILE CONTENT (truncated) ---\n                slide_w, slide_h, slide_z = 25.0, 75.0, 1.0\n        else:\n            slide_w, slide_h, slide_z = self.sklo_dims.get(glass_type, [25.0, 75.0, 1.0])\n\n        nozzle_type = self.cmb_nozzle.currentText()\n        if nozzle_type == \"Vlastní\":\n            nozzle_h = self.inp_nozzle_h.value()\n            nozzle_d = self.inp_nozzle_d.value()\n        else:\n            nozzle_h, nozzle_d = self.nozzle_defs.get(nozzle_type, [30.0, 0.4])\n\n        return {\n            'holder_type': self.cmb_holder.currentText(),\n            'glass_type': glass_type,\n            'slide_w': slide_w,\n            'slide_h': slide_h,\n            'slide_z': slide_z,\n            'sample_count': self.inp_count.value(),\n            'z_offset': self.inp_z_offset.value(),\n            'extrusion_rate': self.inp_extrusion.value(),\n            'nozzle_diam': nozzle_d,\n            'nozzle_height': nozzle_h,\n            'print_speed': self.inp_speed.value(),\n            'retraction': self.inp_retract.value(),\n            'bed_temp': self.inp_bed_temp.value(),\n            # --- PŘIDÁNY SKUTEČNÉ HODNOTY VÝPLNĚ ---\n            'infill_style': self.cmb_infill_style.currentText(),\n            'infill_val': self.inp_infill_val.value(),\n            'infill_type': self.cmb_infill_type.currentText(),\n            'infill_angle': self.inp_infill_angle.value()\n        }\n\n    def get_vector_params(self):\n        params = self.get_all_params()\n        params['margin'] = 1.5  # Okraj použitý při případném zmenšování velkých vzorků\n        return params\n\n    def set_ui_disconnected(self):\n        self.btn_connect.setText(\"Připojit tiskárnu\")\n        self.btn_connect.setStyleSheet(\"QPushButton { background-color: #0d6efd; }\")\n        self.btn_start_print.hide()"
```json
  }
}
```
