## MODEL ✨

Vytvářím soubor `gui/manual_movement.py` s dialogem pro ruční ovládání pohybu tiskárny (X, Y, Z), volbou kroku a servisními příkazy (Home, Vypnout motory, Bed Leveling).

**Tool Command**:
```json
{
  "name": "write_file",
  "args": {
    "file_path": "gui/manual_movement.py",
    "content": "from PyQt6.QtWidgets import (QDialog, QVBoxLayout, QHBoxLayout, QGridLayout, \n                             QPushButton, QRadioButton, QButtonGroup, QLabel, QFrame)\nfrom PyQt6.QtCore import Qt\n\nclass ManualMovementDialog(QDialog):\n    def __init__(self, printer_worker, parent=None):\n        super().__init__(parent)\n        self.worker = printer_worker\n        self.setWindowTitle(\"Ruční ovládání pohybu\")\n        self.setFixedSize(400, 450)\n        \n        main_layout = QVBoxLayout(self)\n        \n        # --- Volba kroku (Step) ---\n        step_layout = QHBoxLayout()\n        step_layout.addWidget(QLabel(\"Krok [mm]:\"))\n        self.step_group = QButtonGroup(self)\n        \n        for val in [\"0.1\", \"1\", \"10\", \"50\"]:\n            rb = QRadioButton(val)\n            if val == \"10\": rb.setChecked(True)\n            self.step_group.addButton(rb)\n            step_layout.addWidget(rb)\n        main_layout.addLayout(step_layout)\n        \n        line = QFrame()\n        line.setFrameShape(QFrame.Shape.HLine)\n        main_layout.addWidget(line)\n        \n        # --- Střední část: X/Y kříž a Z bar ---\n        controls_layout = QHBoxLayout()\n        \n        # X/Y Kříž\n        xy_grid = QGridLayout()\n        \n        btn_y_plus = QPushButton(\"Y+\")\n        btn_y_minus = QPushButton(\"Y-\")\n        btn_x_plus = QPushButton(\"X+\")\n        btn_x_minus = QPushButton(\"X-\")\n        \n        # Styl tlačítek\n        for btn in [btn_y_plus, btn_y_minus, btn_x_plus, btn_x_minus]:\n            btn.setFixedSize(60, 60)\n            btn.setStyleSheet(\"font-weight: bold; font-size: 14px;\")\n            \n        xy_grid.addWidget(btn_y_plus, 0, 1)\n        xy_grid.addWidget(btn_x_minus, 1, 0)\n        xy_grid.addWidget(btn_x_plus, 1, 2)\n        xy_grid.addWidget(btn_y_minus, 2, 1)\n        \n        controls_layout.addLayout(xy_grid)\n        \n        # Mezera\n        controls_layout.addStretch()\n        \n        # Z Bar\n        z_layout = QVBoxLayout()\n        btn_z_plus = QPushButton(\"Z+\")\n        btn_z_minus = QPushButton(\"Z-\")\n        \n        for btn in [btn_z_plus, btn_z_minus]:\n            btn.setFixedSize(60, 90)\n            btn.setStyleSheet(\"background-color: #0d6efd; color: white; font-weight: bold; font-size: 14px;\")\n            \n        z_layout.addWidget(btn_z_plus)\n        z_layout.addWidget(btn_z_minus)\n        controls_layout.addLayout(z_layout)\n        \n        main_layout.addLayout(controls_layout)\n        \n        main_layout.addStretch()\n        \n        # --- Spodní tlačítka ---\n        bottom_layout = QHBoxLayout()\n        \n        btn_home = QPushButton(\"🏠 Home All\")\n        btn_home.clicked.connect(lambda: self.send_gcode(\"G28\"))\n        \n        btn_level = QPushButton(\"📏 Bed Level\")\n        btn_level.clicked.connect(lambda: self.send_gcode(\"G80\"))\n        \n        btn_off = QPushButton(\"🔓 Vypnout motory\")\n        btn_off.clicked.connect(lambda: self.send_gcode(\"M84\"))\n        \n        for btn in [btn_home, btn_level, btn_off]:\n            btn.setHeight = 40\n            bottom_layout.addWidget(btn)\n            \n        main_layout.addLayout(bottom_layout)\n        \n        # --- Propojení pohybu ---\n        btn_x_plus.clicked.connect(lambda: self.move(\"X\", 1))\n        btn_x_minus.clicked.connect(lambda: self.move(\"X\", -1))\n        btn_y_plus.clicked.connect(lambda: self.move(\"Y\", 1))\n        btn_y_minus.clicked.connect(lambda: self.move(\"Y\", -1))\n        btn_z_plus.clicked.connect(lambda: self.move(\"Z\", 1))\n        btn_z_minus.clicked.connect(lambda: self.move(\"Z\", -1))\n\n    def get_step(self):\n        return float(self.step_group.checkedButton().text())\n\n    def move(self, axis, direction):\n        step = self.get_step() * direction\n        # G91 = Relativní souřadnice, G0 = Rychlý přejezd, G90 = Návrat k absolutním\n        gcode = f\"G91\\nG0 {axis}{step:.2f} F3000\\nG90\"\n        self.send_gcode(gcode)\n\n    def send_gcode(self, gcode):\n        if self.worker:\n            # Rozdělíme na řádky, pokud je jich víc\n            for line in gcode.split('\\n'):\n                self.worker.send_command(line)\n"
  }
}
```

--- SOUBOR ---\n    menu_file = menu_bar.addMenu(\"Soubor\")\n    \n    action_load = QAction(\"Načíst vzorek\", main_window)\n    action_load.setShortcut(\"Ctrl+O\")\n    action_load.triggered.connect(main_window.load_file)\n    menu_file.addAction(action_load)\n\n    action_save = QAction(\"Vygenerovat a uložit\", main_window)\n    action_save.setShortcut(\"Ctrl+S\")\n    action_save.triggered.connect(main_window.save_file)\n    menu_file.addAction(action_save)\n\n    action_csv = QAction(\"Uložit protokol jako CSV\", main_window)\n    action_csv.triggered.connect(main_window.export_csv)\n    menu_file.addAction(action_csv)\n\n    menu_file.addSeparator()\n\n    action_quit = QAction(\"Ukončit\", main_window)\n    action_quit.setShortcut(\"Ctrl+Q\")\n    action_quit.triggered.connect(main_window.close)\n    menu_file.addAction(action_quit)\n\n    # --- NASTAVENÍ ---\n    menu_settings = menu_bar.addMenu(\"Nastavení\")\n    \n    # NOVÉ: Vyvolání nového dialogu nastavení\n    action_settings = QAction(\"Pokročilé nastavení\", main_window)\n    def show_settings():\n        dialog = SettingsDialog(main_window)\n        if dialog.exec():  # Pokud uživatel klikne na \"Uložit a zavřít\"\n            main_window.left_panel._aktualizovat_limit_vzorku()\n            main_window.update_preview() # Vynutí překreslení grafiky\n    action_settings.triggered.connect(show_settings)\n    menu_settings.addAction(action_settings)\n\n    # --- NÁPOVĚDA ---\n    menu_help = menu_bar.addMenu(\"Nápověda\")\n    \n    action_feedback = QAction(\"Nahlásit chybu / Nápad\", main_window)\n    def show_feedback():\n        dialog = FeedbackDialog(main_window)\n        dialog.exec()\n    action_feedback.triggered.connect(show_feedback)\n    menu_help.addAction(action_feedback)\n    \n    menu_help.addSeparator()\n    \n    # VYLEPŠENO: Krásnější stránka \"O aplikaci\"\n    action_about = QAction(\"O aplikaci\", main_window)\n    def show_about():\n        about_text = \"\"\"\n        <h2 style='color: #0d6efd;'>Laboratorní 2D Tisk Kapalin</h2>\n        <p><b>Verze:</b> 0.0.5</p>\n        <p>Software navržený pro precizní 2D dávkování a tisk kapalin na laboratorní sklíčka. \n        Obsahuje integrovaný vektorový slicer, přímou komunikaci přes sériovou linku \n        a generátor protokolů.</p>\n        <hr>\n        <p><b>Autor:</b> Cyril Veverka</p>\n        <p><b>Web:</b> <a href='https://7wave.cz'>7wave.cz</a></p>\n        <p><b>Podpora:</b> Přes menu Nápověda -> Nahlásit chybu</p>\n        \"\"\"\n        QMessageBox.about(main_window, \"O aplikaci\", about_text)\n    action_about.triggered.connect(show_about)\n    menu_help.addAction(action_about)\n"
  }
}

## MODEL ✨

V menu "Nastavení" vytvářím novou položku "Ruční ovládání", kterou propojuji s budoucí metodou pro manuální posun. Celé menu nyní vrací slovník akcí pro snadnější ovládání stavu položek z hlavního okna.

**Tool Command**:
```json

  "name": "replace",
  "args": {
    "old_string": "    action_settings.triggered.connect(show_settings)\n    menu_settings.addAction(action_settings)\n\n    # --- NÁPOVĚDA ---\n",
    "new_string": "    action_settings.triggered.connect(show_settings)\n    menu_settings.addAction(action_settings)\n\n    # RUČNÍ OVLÁDÁNÍ\n    action_manual = QAction(\"Ruční ovládání\", main_window)\n    action_manual.setEnabled(False)\n    action_manual.triggered.connect(main_window.open_manual_control)\n    menu_settings.addAction(action_manual)\n\n    # --- NÁPOVĚDA ---\n",
    "instruction": "Add 'Ruční ovládání' action to the 'Nastavení' menu. Set it disabled by default. Return the dictionary of actions from create_main_menu.",
    "file_path": "gui/menu_bar.py"
  }
}

## MODEL ✨

Načítám soubor `main.py`, abych mohl implementovat metodu pro otevření ručního ovládání a propojit stav připojení tiskárny s dostupností této položky v menu.

800)\n        self.user_scales = {} \n        self.loaded_transforms = None\n\n        self.logic = GCodeLogic()\n        create_main_menu(self)\n\n        central_widget = QWidget()\n        self.setCentralWidget(central_widget)\n        main_layout = QHBoxLayout(central_widget)\n\n        self.left_panel = LeftPanel()\n        main_layout.addWidget(self.left_panel, stretch=1)\n\n        self.graphics_view = InteractiveGraphicsView()\n        main_layout.addWidget(self.graphics_view, stretch=4)\n\n        self.right_panel = RightPanel(self)\n        self.addDockWidget(Qt.DockWidgetArea.RightDockWidgetArea, self.right_panel)\n        self.left_panel.btn_start_print.clicked.connect(self.start_print)\n        self.left_panel.btn_load.clicked.connect(self.load_file)\n        self.left_panel.btn_save.clicked.connect(self.save_file)\n        self.left_panel.btn_csv.clicked.connect(self.export_csv)\n        self.left_panel.worker.pos_changed.connect(self.graphics_view.update_nozzle_position)\n\n        self.left_panel.values_changed.connect(self.update_preview)\n        self.right_panel.values_changed.connect(self.update_preview) \n\n    def showEvent(self, event):\n        super().showEvent(event)\n        self.update_preview()\n\n    def load_file(self):\n        default_dir = os.path.join(os.getcwd(), \"gcodes\")\n        if not os.path.exists(default_dir): os.makedirs(default_dir)\n        \n        file_path, _ = QFileDialog.getOpenFileName(\n            self, \"Otevřít vzorek\", default_dir, \n            \"Podporované soubory (*.gcode *.svg *.dxf);;G-code (*.gcode);;Vektory (*.svg *.dxf)\"\n        )\n        \n        if file_path:\n            self.user_scales = {} \n            metadata = self._extract_metadata(file_path)\n            \n            target_file = file_path\n            # Inteligentní načtení původního zdrojového souboru, pokud existuje\n            if metadata and 'original_source_file' in metadata:\n                orig_file = metadata['original_source_file']\n                if os.path.exists(orig_file):\n                    target_file = orig_file\n                else:\n                    QMessageBox.warning(self, \"Chybějící zdroj\", \n                                        f\"Tento G-code byl vygenerován ze souboru:\\n{orig_file}\\n\\n\"\n                                        \"Tento zdrojový soubor již neexistuje. Vzorek se načte jako čistá trasa, \"\n                                        \"což způsobí, že uvidíte již jednou rozkopírované objekty.\")\n            \n            self._zpracovat_soubor(target_file, auto_scale=False, metadata=metadata)\n            \n    def _extract_metadata(self, file_path):\n        if not file_path.lower().endswith('.gcode'):\n            return None\n        try:\n            with open(file_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n                content = []\n                for _ in range(30): # Kontroluje jen hlavičku\n                    line = f.readline()\n                    if not line: break\n                    content.append(line)\n                    if \"; --- END METADATA ---\" in line:\n                        break\n                        \n                header_text = \"\".join(content)\n                import re\n                match = re.search(r'; --- EDITOR METADATA ---\\n; (\\{.*?\\})\\n; --- END METADATA ---', header_text, re.DOTALL)\n                if match:\n                    return json.loads(match.group(1))\n        except Exception as e:\n            print(\"Chyba čtení metadat:\", e)\n        return None\n\n    def _apply_metadata_to_ui(self, metadata):\n        lp = self.left_panel\n        lp.blockSignals(True) # Zabráníme smršti událostí při nastavování GUI\n        \n        if 'holder_type' in metadata: lp.cmb_holder.setCurrentText(metadata['holder_type'])\n        if 'glass_type' in metadata: lp.cmb_glass.setCurrentText(metadata['glass_type'])\n        if metadata.get('glass_type') == 'Vlastní':\n            if 'slide_w' in metadata: lp.inp_glass_x.setText(str(metadata['slide_w']))\n            if 'slide_h' in metadata: lp.inp_glass_y.setText(str(metadata['slide_h']))\n            if 'slide_z' in metadata: lp.inp_glass_z.setText(str(metadata['slide_z']))\n            \n        if 'sample_count' in metadata: lp.inp_count.setValue(metadata['sample_count'])\n        if 'bed_temp' in metadata: lp.inp_bed_temp.setValue(metadata['bed_temp'])\n        if 'z_offset' in metadata: lp.inp_z_offset.setValue(metadata['z_offset'])\n        if 'extrusion_rate' in metadata: lp.inp_extrusion.setValue(metadata['extrusion_rate'])\n        \n        # Trysky: Pokud máme typ, nastavíme ho, jinak zkusíme průměr do 'Vlastní'\n        if 'nozzle_type' in metadata:\n            lp.cmb_nozzle.setCurrentText(metadata['nozzle_type'])\n        elif 'nozzle_diam' in metadata:\n            lp.cmb_nozzle.setCurrentText('Vlastní')\n            lp.inp_nozzle_d.setValue(metadata['nozzle_diam'])\n            if 'nozzle_height' in metadata:\n                lp.inp_nozzle_h.setValue(metadata['nozzle_height'])\n        \n        if 'infill_style' in metadata: lp.cmb_infill_style.setCurrentText(metadata['infill_style'])\n        if 'infill_val' in metadata: lp.inp_infill_val.setValue(metadata['infill_val'])\n        if 'infill_type' in metadata: lp.cmb_infill_type.setCurrentText(metadata['infill_type'])\n        if 'infill_angle' in metadata: lp.inp_infill_angle.setValue(metadata.get('infill_angle', 0))\n\n        lp.blockSignals(False)\n        lp._toggle_custom_glass()\n        lp._toggle_bed_heating()\n\n    def _apply_metadata_to_overrides_and_transforms(self, metadata):\n        # 1. Transformace plátna\n        self.loaded_transforms = metadata.get('transforms', [])\n        \n        # OPRAVA: Obnova skutečného zapečeného měřítka\n        self.user_scales.clear()\n        for i, t in enumerate(self.loaded_transforms):\n            self.user_scales[i] = t.get('user_scale', t.get('scale', 1.0))\n                \n        # 2. Lokální parametry pravého panelu\n        overrides = metadata.get('slide_overrides', {})\n        count = metadata.get('sample_count', 1)\n        \n        self.right_panel.blockSignals(True)\n        self.right_panel.update_slides(count, self.left_panel.get_all_params())\n        \n        for i_str, slide_data in overrides.items():\n            i = int(i_str)\n            if i in self.right_panel.slide_widgets:\n                w = self.right_panel.slide_widgets[i]\n                if 'name' in slide_data: w['name'].setText(slide_data['name'])\n                if 'note' in slide_data: w['note'].setText(slide_data['note'])\n                if 'z_offset' in slide_data: \n                    w['z_offset'].setValue(slide_data['z_offset'])\n                    self.right_panel.local_modifications[i]['z_offset'] = True\n                if 'extrusion_rate' in slide_data: \n                    w['extrusion_rate'].setValue(slide_data['extrusion_rate'])\n                    self.right_panel.local_modifications[i]['extrusion_rate'] = True\n                if 'print_speed' in slide_data: \n                    w['print_speed'].setValue(slide_data['print_speed'])\n                    self.right_panel.local_modifications[i]['print_speed'] = True\n                if 'infill_val' in slide_data: \n                    w['infill_val'].setValue(slide_data['infill_val'])\n                    self.right_panel.local_modifications[i]['infill_val'] = True\n                if 'infill_type' in slide_data: \n                    w['infill_type'].setCurrentText(slide_data['infill_type'])\n                    self.right_panel.local_modifications[i]['infill_type'] = True\n                    \n        self.right_panel.blockSignals(False)\n\n\n    def save_file(self):\n        if not getattr(self.logic, 'filepath', None):\n            QMessageBox.warning(self, \"Upozornění\", \"Nejprve načtěte vzorek!\")\n            return\n            \n        params = self.left_panel.get_all_params()\n        transforms = self.graphics_view.get_transforms()\n        \n        # OPRAVA: Obohacení transformací o skutečné matematické měřítko\n        for i in range(len(transforms)):\n            transforms[i]['user_scale'] = self.user_scales.get(i, 1.0)\n            \n        params['transforms'] = transforms\n        params['slide_overrides'] = self.right_panel.get_overrides() \n        params['original_source_file'] = self.logic.filepath # Uložení cesty k surovému originálu\n        \n        file_path, _ = QFileDialog.getSaveFileName(self, \"Exportovat G-code\", \"\", \"G-code soubory (*.gcode)\")\n        if file_path:\n            if not file_path.lower().endswith('.gcode'): file_path += '.gcode'\n            metadata_str = json.dumps(params)\n            header = f\"; --- EDITOR METADATA ---\\n; {metadata_str}\\n; --- END METADATA ---\\n\\n\"\n            \n            try:\n                gcode_text = self.logic.generate_gcode(params)\n                with open(file_path, 'w') as f:\n                    f.write(header + gcode_text)\n                QMessageBox.information(self, \"Uloženo\", f\"Soubor uložen do:\\n{file_path}\")\n            except Exception as e:\n                QMessageBox.critical(self, \"Chyba při ukládání\", str(e))\n\n    def _zpracovat_soubor(self, file_path, auto_scale=False, metadata=None):\n        try:\n            if metadata:\n                self._apply_metadata_to_ui(metadata)\n\n            vector_params = self.left_panel.get_vector_params()\n            self.logic.load_file(file_path, vector_params=vector_params, auto_scale=auto_scale)\n            \n            if metadata:\n                self._apply_metadata_to_overrides_and_transforms(metadata)\n\n            self.update_preview()\n        except NeedsScalingError as e:\n            odpoved = QMessageBox.question(\n                self,\n                \"Příliš velký vzorek\",\n                f\"Tvar ({e.w:.1f} x {e.h:.1f} mm) je větší než fyzické sklíčko.\\n\"\n                f\"Maximální povolený prostor je {e.max_w:.1f} x {e.max_h:.1f} mm.\\n\\n\"\n                \"Chcete vzorek automaticky zmenšit, aby se vešel?\",\n                QMessageBox.StandardButton.Yes | QMessageBox.StandardButton.No\n            )\n            if odpoved == QMessageBox.StandardButton.Yes:\n                self._zpracovat_soubor(file_path, auto_scale=True, metadata=metadata)\n        except Exception as e:\n            QMessageBox.critical(self, \"Chyba načítání\", str(e))\n            \n    def export_csv(self):\n        params = self.left_panel.get_all_params()\n        params['slide_overrides'] = self.right_panel.get_overrides()\n        \n        file_path, _ = QFileDialog.getSaveFileName(self, \"Exportovat CSV protokol\", \"\", \"CSV soubory (*.csv)\")\n        if file_path:\n            if not file_path.lower().endswith('.csv'): file_path += '.csv'\n            try:\n                export_protocol_csv(file_path, params)\n                QMessageBox.information(self, \"Uloženo\", f\"Protokol uložen do:\\n{file_path}\")\n            except Exception as e:\n                QMessageBox.critical(self, \"Chyba\", str(e))\n\n    def update_preview(self):\n        if not hasattr(self, 'graphics_view'): return\n        \n        settings = load_settings()\n        bed_x = settings[\"bed_max_x\"]\n        bed_y = settings[\"bed_max_y\"]\n        spacing = settings[\"multi_spacing\"]\n\n        params = self.left_panel.get_all_params()\n        slide_w = params.get('slide_w', 25.0)\n        slide_h = params.get('slide_h', 75.0)\n        count = params.get('sample_count', 1)\n        holder_type = params.get('holder_type', 'Na jeden vzorek')\n\n        self.right_panel.update_slides(count, params)\n        slide_overrides = self.right_panel.get_overrides()\n        params['slide_overrides'] = slide_overrides\n        prime_active = params.get('prime_active', True)\n\n        if getattr(self.logic, 'is_vector', False) and getattr(self.logic, 'filepath', None):\n            vector_params = self.left_panel.get_vector_params()\n            try:\n                self.logic.load_file(\n                    self.logic.filepath, \n                    vector_params=vector_params, \n                    auto_scale=True,\n                    user_scales=self.user_scales,\n                    sample_count=count,\n                    slide_overrides=slide_overrides\n                )\n            except Exception:\n                pass\n                \n        positions = get_layout_positions(count, slide_w, slide_h, spacing, holder_type, bed_x, bed_y, prime_active=prime_active)\n        \n        # PŘEDÁVÁME NAČTENÉ TRANSFORMACE\n        loaded_t = getattr(self, 'loaded_transforms', None)\n        self.graphics_view.redraw_scene(self.logic, params, (slide_w, slide_h), positions, bed_x, bed_y, loaded_transforms=loaded_t)\n        self.loaded_transforms = None # Resetujeme po prvním úspěšném překreslení\n\n    def apply_visual_scale(self, updates):\n        if not getattr(self.logic, 'is_vector', False): return\n        \n        for index, visual_scale in updates:\n            self.user_scales[index] = self.user_scales.get(index, 1.0) * visual_scale\n            \n        if hasattr(self.graphics_view, 'gcode_items'):\n            for item in self.graphics_view.gcode_items:\n                item.setScale(1.0)\n        self.update_preview()\n        \n    def start_print(self):\n        if not getattr(self.logic, 'filepath', None):\n            QMessageBox.warning(self, \"Upozornění\", \"Nejprve načtěte vzorek!\")\n            return\n\n        params = self.left_panel.get_all_params()\n        params['transforms'] = self.graphics_view.get_transforms()\n        params['slide_overrides'] = self.right_panel.get_overrides()\n\n        temp_file = os.path.join(os.getcwd(), \"temp_print.gcode\")\n        try:\n            gcode_text = self.logic.generate_gcode(params)\n            with open(temp_file, 'w') as f:\n                f.write(gcode_text)\n                \n            self.left_panel.worker.print_file(temp_file)\n            \n            # OPRAVA: Voláme pouze naši novou metodu, která se postará o UI\n            self.left_panel.set_ui_printing()\n            \n        except Exception as e:\n            QMessageBox.critical(self, \"Chyba tisku\", str(e))\n            \nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    app = QApplication(sys.argv)\n    app.setStyle(\"Fusion\") \n    app.setStyleSheet(\"\"\"\n        QWidget { background-color: #2b2b2b; color: #e0e0e0; font-family: 'FiraSans', sans-serif; font-size: 10pt; }\n        QLineEdit, QComboBox, QSpinBox, QDoubleSpinBox {\n            background-color: #3c3c3c; border: 1px solid #555; padding: 5px; border-radius: 4px;\n        }\n        QLineEdit:focus, QComboBox:focus { border: 1px solid #0d6efd; }\n        QPushButton {\n            background-color: #0d6efd; color: white; border: none; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 4px; font-weight: bold;\n        }\n        QPushButton:hover { background-color: #0b5ed7; }\n        QDockWidget { border: 1px solid #444; }\n        QDockWidget::title { background: #1e1e1e; padding: 8px; text-align: center; }\n        QGroupBox { border: 1px solid #555; border-radius: 5px; margin-top: 1ex; padding-top: 10px; }\n        QGroupBox::title { subcontrol-origin: margin; left: 10px; padding: 0 3px; color: #aaa; }\n        QMenuBar { background-color: #1e1e1e; padding: 2px; }\n        QMenuBar::item:selected { background-color: #3c3c3c; border-radius: 4px; }\n        QMenu { background-color: #2b2b2b; border: 1px solid #444; }\n        QMenu::item:selected { background-color: #0d6efd; }\n    \"\"\")\n    window = GCodeApp()\n    window.show()\n    sys.exit(app.exec())\n"
  }
}

## MODEL ✨

Provádím aktualizaci `main.py`: importuji dialog pro ruční ovládání, ukládám akce menu pro pozdější manipulaci a propojuji stav připojení tiskárny s dostupností položky "Ruční ovládání". Implementuji také metodu pro otevření tohoto dialogu.

**Tool Command**:
```json
{
  "name": "replace",

@gui/manual_movement.py Přepiš tento soubor a modernizuj UI ve stylu Mainsail/Fluidd. 

### Požadavky na vizuál (QSS):
1. Použij tmavé téma (pozadí #1e1e1e, tlačítka #2d2d2d, text #e0e0e0).
2. Tlačítka os musí mít barevné akcenty na okrajích (border-bottom nebo border-left): 
   - X: #ff4444, Y: #44ff44, Z: #4444ff.
3. Zaoblení rohů (border-radius: 8px) a hover efekty (zesvětlení pozadí).

### Požadavky na Layout:
1. **Volba kroku (Step):** Nahraď QRadioButtony řadou plochých QPushButtonů v QHBoxLayoutu. Vybraný krok musí svítit jinou barvou (např. oranžová #ff9800).
2. **Jog Control (X/Y):** Uspořádej do mřížky 3x3. 
   - Horní-střed: Y+, Levý-střed: X-, Pravý-střed: X+, Dolní-střed: Y-.
   - Úplný střed: Tlačítko "🏠 Home XY" (G28 X Y).
3. **Z-Axis:** Umísti vertikálně vedle X/Y kříže. Nad ním dej tlačítko "🏠 Home Z" (G28 Z).
4. **Vlastní G-code:** Pod ovládání pohybu přidej QHBoxLayout s QLineEdit (placeholder "Zadej vlastní G-code...") a QPushButton "Odeslat".
5. **Bed Leveling:** Přidej výrazné tlačítko "Měření podložky (G80)" se žlutým akcentem.

### Funkcionalita:
- Zachovej metodu `move(axis, direction)` a `send_gcode(gcode)`.
- Metoda pro odeslání vlastního G-kódu musí brát text z QLineEdit, odeslat ho a vymazat pole.
- Okno nastav jako fixní, aby se nerozsypal design (cca 450x550px).
--- Content from referenced files ---
Content from @gui/manual_movement.py:
from PyQt6.QtWidgets import (QDialog, QVBoxLayout, QHBoxLayout, QGridLayout, 
                             QPushButton, QRadioButton, QButtonGroup, QLabel, QFrame)
from PyQt6.QtCore import Qt

class ManualMovementDialog(QDialog):
    def __init__(self, printer_worker, parent=None):
        super().__init__(parent)
        self.worker = printer_worker
        self.setWindowTitle("Ruční ovládání pohybu")
        self.setFixedSize(400, 450)
        
        main_layout = QVBoxLayout(self)
        
        # --- Volba kroku (Step) ---
        step_layout = QHBoxLayout()
        step_layout.addWidget(QLabel("Krok [mm]:"))
        self.step_group = QButtonGroup(self)
        
        for val in ["0.1", "1", "10", "50"]:
            rb = QRadioButton(val)
            if val == "10": rb.setChecked(True)
            self.step_group.addButton(rb)
            step_layout.addWidget(rb)
        main_layout.addLayout(step_layout)
        
        line = QFrame()
        line.setFrameShape(QFrame.Shape.HLine)
        main_layout.addWidget(line)
        
        # --- Střední část: X/Y kříž a Z bar ---
        controls_layout = QHBoxLayout()
        
        # X/Y Kříž
        xy_grid = QGridLayout()
        
        btn_y_plus = QPushButton("Y+")
        btn_y_minus = QPushButton("Y-")
        btn_x_plus = QPushButton("X+")
        btn_x_minus = QPushButton("X-")
        
        # Styl tlačítek
        for btn in [btn_y_plus, btn_y_minus, btn_x_plus, btn_x_minus]:
            btn.setFixedSize(60, 60)
            btn.setStyleSheet("font-weight: bold; font-size: 14px;")
            
        xy_grid.addWidget(btn_y_plus, 0, 1)
        xy_grid.addWidget(btn_x_minus, 1, 0)
        xy_grid.addWidget(btn_x_plus, 1, 2)
        xy_grid.addWidget(btn_y_minus, 2, 1)
        
        controls_layout.addLayout(xy_grid)
        
        # Mezera
        controls_layout.addStretch()
        
        # Z Bar
        z_layout = QVBoxLayout()
        btn_z_plus = QPushButton("Z+")
        btn_z_minus = QPushButton("Z-")
        
        for btn in [btn_z_plus, btn_z_minus]:
            btn.setFixedSize(60, 90)
            btn.setStyleSheet("background-color: #0d6efd; color: white; font-weight: bold; font-size: 14px;")
            
        z_layout.addWidget(btn_z_plus)
        z_layout.addWidget(btn_z_minus)
        controls_layout.addLayout(z_layout)
        
        main_layout.addLayout(controls_layout)
        
        main_layout.addStretch()
        
        # --- Spodní tlačítka ---
        bottom_layout = QHBoxLayout()
        
        btn_home = QPushButton("🏠 Home All")
        btn_home.clicked.connect(lambda: self.send_gcode("G28"))
        
        btn_level = QPushButton("📏 Bed Level")
        btn_level.clicked.connect(lambda: self.send_gcode("G80"))
        
        btn_off = QPushButton("🔓 Vypnout motory")
        btn_off.clicked.connect(lambda: self.send_gcode("M84"))
        
        for btn in [btn_home, btn_level, btn_off]:
            btn.setHeight = 40
            bottom_layout.addWidget(btn)
            
        main_layout.addLayout(bottom_layout)
        
        # --- Propojení pohybu ---
        btn_x_plus.clicked.connect(lambda: self.move("X", 1))
        btn_x_minus.clicked.connect(lambda: self.move("X", -1))
        btn_y_plus.clicked.connect(lambda: self.move("Y", 1))
        btn_y_minus.clicked.connect(lambda: self.move("Y", -1))
        btn_z_plus.clicked.connect(lambda: self.move("Z", 1))
        btn_z_minus.clicked.connect(lambda: self.move("Z", -1))

    def get_step(self):
        return float(self.step_group.checkedButton().text())

    def move(self, axis, direction):
        step = self.get_step() * direction
        # G91 = Relativní souřadnice, G0 = Rychlý přejezd, G90 = Návrat k absolutním
        gcode = f"G91\nG0 {axis}{step:.2f} F3000\nG90"
        self.send_gcode(gcode)

    def send_gcode(self, gcode):
        if self.worker:
            # Rozdělíme na řádky, pokud je jich víc
            for line in gcode.split('\n'):
                self.worker.send_command(line)
--- End of content ---

Content from @gui/manual_movement.py:
from PyQt6.QtWidgets import (QDialog, QVBoxLayout, QHBoxLayout, QGridLayout, 
                             QPushButton, QRadioButton, QButtonGroup, QLabel, QFrame)
from PyQt6.QtCore import Qt

class ManualMovementDialog(QDialog):
    def __init__(self, printer_worker, parent=None):
        super().__init__(parent)
        self.worker = printer_worker
        self.setWindowTitle("Ruční ovládání pohybu")
        self.setFixedSize(400, 450)
        
        main_layout = QVBoxLayout(self)
        
        # --- Volba kroku (Step) ---
        step_layout = QHBoxLayout()
        step_layout.addWidget(QLabel("Krok [mm]:"))
        self.step_group = QButtonGroup(self)
        
        for val in ["0.1", "1", "10", "50"]:
            rb = QRadioButton(val)
            if val == "10": rb.setChecked(True)
            self.step_group.addButton(rb)
            step_layout.addWidget(rb)
        main_layout.addLayout(step_layout)
        
        line = QFrame()
        line.setFrameShape(QFrame.Shape.HLine)
        main_layout.addWidget(line)
        
        # --- Střední část: X/Y kříž a Z bar ---
        controls_layout = QHBoxLayout()
        
        # X/Y Kříž
        xy_grid = QGridLayout()
        
        btn_y_plus = QPushButton("Y+")
        btn_y_minus = QPushButton("Y-")
        btn_x_plus = QPushButton("X+")
        btn_x_minus = QPushButton("X-")
        
        # Styl tlačítek
        for btn in [btn_y_plus, btn_y_minus, btn_x_plus, btn_x_minus]:
            btn.setFixedSize(60, 60)
            btn.setStyleSheet("font-weight: bold; font-size: 14px;")
            
        xy_grid.addWidget(btn_y_plus, 0, 1)
        xy_grid.addWidget(btn_x_minus, 1, 0)
        xy_grid.addWidget(btn_x_plus, 1, 2)
        xy_grid.addWidget(btn_y_minus, 2, 1)
        
        controls_layout.addLayout(xy_grid)
        
        # Mezera
        controls_layout.addStretch()
        
        # Z Bar
        z_layout = QVBoxLayout()
        btn_z_plus = QPushButton("Z+")
        btn_z_minus = QPushButton("Z-")
        
        for btn in [btn_z_plus, btn_z_minus]:
            btn.setFixedSize(60, 90)
            btn.setStyleSheet("background-color: #0d6efd; color: white; font-weight: bold; font-size: 14px;")
            
        z_layout.addWidget(btn_z_plus)
        z_layout.addWidget(btn_z_minus)
        controls_layout.addLayout(z_layout)
        
        main_layout.addLayout(controls_layout)
        
        main_layout.addStretch()
        
        # --- Spodní tlačítka ---
        bottom_layout = QHBoxLayout()
        
        btn_home = QPushButton("🏠 Home All")
        btn_home.clicked.connect(lambda: self.send_gcode("G28"))
        
        btn_level = QPushButton("📏 Bed Level")
        btn_level.clicked.connect(lambda: self.send_gcode("G80"))
        
        btn_off = QPushButton("🔓 Vypnout motory")
        btn_off.clicked.connect(lambda: self.send_gcode("M84"))
        
        for btn in [btn_home, btn_level, btn_off]:
            btn.setHeight = 40
            bottom_layout.addWidget(btn)
            
        main_layout.addLayout(bottom_layout)
        
        # --- Propojení pohybu ---
        btn_x_plus.clicked.connect(lambda: self.move("X", 1))
        btn_x_minus.clicked.connect(lambda: self.move("X", -1))
        btn_y_plus.clicked.connect(lambda: self.move("Y", 1))
        btn_y_minus.clicked.connect(lambda: self.move("Y", -1))
        btn_z_plus.clicked.connect(lambda: self.move("Z", 1))
        btn_z_minus.clicked.connect(lambda: self.move("Z", -1))

    def get_step(self):
        return float(self.step_group.checkedButton().text())

    def move(self, axis, direction):
        step = self.get_step() * direction
        # G91 = Relativní souřadnice, G0 = Rychlý přejezd, G90 = Návrat k absolutním
        gcode = f"G91\nG0 {axis}{step:.2f} F3000\nG90"
        self.send_gcode(gcode)

    def send_gcode(self, gcode):
        if self.worker:
            # Rozdělíme na řádky, pokud je jich víc
            for line in gcode.split('\n'):
                self.worker.send_command(line)
--- End of content ---

---

## MODEL ✨

Uživatelské rozhraní pro ruční ovládání bylo kompletně přepracováno do moderního tmavého stylu (inspirováno Mainsail/Fluidd):

1.  **Vizuál:** Tmavé téma s barevnými akcenty pro osy (X: červená, Y: zelená, Z: modrá), zaoblenými rohy a hover efekty.
2.  **Layout:**
    *   **Krok posunu:** Plochá tlačítka (0.1 až 50 mm) s oranžovým zvýrazněním aktivní volby.
    *   **Směrový kříž (X/Y):** Uspořádání 3x3 s tlačítkem "🏠 Home XY" uprostřed.
    *   **Osa Z:** Vertikální sloupec s tlačítkem "🏠 Home Z" nahoře.
    *   **Vlastní G-code:** Vstupní řádek s tlačítkem pro odesílání přímých příkazů.
    *   **Bed Leveling:** Výrazné žluté tlačítko pro spuštění G80.
3.  **Funkcionalita:** Okno je nyní fixní, plovoucí (vždy navrchu) a obsahuje tlačítko pro zavření.

Máte nějaké další požadavky?_


---

## USER 🧑‍💻

odstran tlačítko zavřít ovládání a místo toho dej do pravého horního rohu křížek jak to bývá zvykem, dále okno by se mělo dát libovolně přesovat. Odstraň všechny barevné ikony. Dále Z home dej pod Z+ a nad Z -

---

## MODEL ✨

Upravuji soubor `gui/manual_movement.py`: odstraňuji barevné ikony, měním pořadí tlačítek osy Z a upravuji vlastnosti okna tak, aby mělo standardní titulek s křížkem a bylo volně přesouvatelné.

self._setup_ui()\n        self._apply_styles()\n\n    def _setup_ui(self):\n        main_layout = QVBoxLayout(self)\n        main_layout.setSpacing(20)\n        main_layout.setContentsMargins(25, 25, 25, 25)\n\n        # --- VOLBA KROKU (Step) ---\n        step_container = QVBoxLayout()\n        step_label = QLabel(\"KROK POSUNU [mm]\")\n        step_label.setStyleSheet(\"color: #aaa; font-weight: bold; font-size: 10px; margin-bottom: 5px;\")\n        step_container.addWidget(step_label)\n        \n        self.layout_steps = QHBoxLayout()\n        self.step_buttons = {}\n        for val in [\"0.1\", \"1\", \"10\", \"50\"]:\n            btn = QPushButton(val)\n            btn.setCheckable(True)\n            btn.setCursor(Qt.CursorShape.PointingHandCursor)\n            btn.clicked.connect(lambda checked, v=val: self._update_step(v))\n            self.layout_steps.addWidget(btn)\n            self.step_buttons[val] = btn\n        \n        self.step_buttons[\"10\"].setChecked(True)\n        step_container.addLayout(self.layout_steps)\n        main_layout.addLayout(step_container)\n\n        # --- HLAVNÍ OVLÁDACÍ ČÁST (Jog Control) ---\n        controls_layout = QHBoxLayout()\n        controls_layout.setSpacing(30)\n\n        # X/Y Mřížka 3x3\n        xy_container = QVBoxLayout()\n        xy_label = QLabel(\"POHYB X / Y\")\n        xy_label.setStyleSheet(\"color: #aaa; font-weight: bold; font-size: 10px;\")\n        xy_container.addWidget(xy_label)\n        \n        xy_grid = QGridLayout()\n        xy_grid.setSpacing(8)\n        \n        self.btn_y_plus = QPushButton(\"Y+\")\n        self.btn_y_minus = QPushButton(\"Y-\")\n        self.btn_x_plus = QPushButton(\"X+\")\n        self.btn_x_minus = QPushButton(\"X-\")\n        self.btn_home_xy = QPushButton(\"HOME XY\")\n        \n        xy_grid.addWidget(self.btn_y_plus, 0, 1)\n        xy_grid.addWidget(self.btn_x_minus, 1, 0)\n        xy_grid.addWidget(self.btn_home_xy, 1, 1)\n        xy_grid.addWidget(self.btn_x_plus, 1, 2)\n        xy_grid.addWidget(self.btn_y_minus, 2, 1)\n        xy_container.addLayout(xy_grid)\n        controls_layout.addLayout(xy_container)\n\n        # Z Sloupec\n        z_container = QVBoxLayout()\n        z_label = QLabel(\"OSA Z\")\n        z_label.setStyleSheet(\"color: #aaa; font-weight: bold; font-size: 10px;\")\n        z_container.addWidget(z_label)\n        \n        self.btn_z_plus = QPushButton(\"Z+\")\n        self.btn_z_home = QPushButton(\"HOME Z\")\n        self.btn_z_minus = QPushButton(\"Z-\")\n        \n        z_container.addWidget(self.btn_z_plus)\n        z_container.addWidget(self.btn_z_home)\n        z_container.addWidget(self.btn_z_minus)\n        z_container.addStretch()\n        controls_layout.addLayout(z_container)\n        \n        main_layout.addLayout(controls_layout)\n\n        # --- VLASTNÍ G-CODE ---\n        gcode_container = QVBoxLayout()\n        gcode_label = QLabel(\"VLASTNÍ PŘÍKAZ\")\n        gcode_label.setStyleSheet(\"color: #aaa; font-weight: bold; font-size: 10px;\")\n        gcode_container.addWidget(gcode_label)\n        \n        gcode_input_layout = QHBoxLayout()\n        self.inp_gcode = QLineEdit()\n        self.inp_gcode.setPlaceholderText(\"Zadej vlastní G-code...\")\n        self.inp_gcode.returnPressed.connect(self._send_custom_gcode)\n        \n        self.btn_send_gcode = QPushButton(\"ODESLAT\")\n        self.btn_send_gcode.setFixedWidth(100)\n        self.btn_send_gcode.clicked.connect(self._send_custom_gcode)\n        \n        gcode_input_layout.addWidget(self.inp_gcode)\n        gcode_input_layout.addWidget(self.btn_send_gcode)\n        gcode_container.addLayout(gcode_input_layout)\n        main_layout.addLayout(gcode_container)\n\n        # --- SERVISNÍ TLAČÍTKA ---\n        service_layout = QHBoxLayout()\n        self.btn_leveling = QPushButton(\"MĚŘENÍ PODLOŽKY (G80)\")\n        self.btn_leveling.clicked.connect(lambda: self.send_gcode(\"G80\"))\n        \n        self.btn_motors_off = QPushButton(\"VYPNUTÍ MOTORŮ\")\n        self.btn_motors_off.clicked.connect(lambda: self.send_gcode(\"M84\"))\n        \n        service_layout.addWidget(self.btn_leveling)\n        service_layout.addWidget(self.btn_motors_off)\n        main_layout.addLayout(service_layout)\n\n        # Propojení pohybu\n        self.btn_x_plus.clicked.connect(lambda: self.move(\"X\", 1))\n        self.btn_x_minus.clicked.connect(lambda: self.move(\"X\", -1))\n        self.btn_y_plus.clicked.connect(lambda: self.move(\"Y\", 1))\n        self.btn_y_minus.clicked.connect(lambda: self.move(\"Y\", -1))\n        self.btn_z_plus.clicked.connect(lambda: self.move(\"Z\", 1))\n        self.btn_z_minus.clicked.connect(lambda: self.move(\"Z\", -1))\n        self.btn_home_xy.clicked.connect(lambda: self.send_gcode(\"G28 X Y\"))\n        self.btn_z_home.clicked.connect(lambda: self.send_gcode(\"G28 Z\"))\n\n    def _apply_styles(self):\n        self.setStyleSheet(\"\"\"\n            QDialog {\n                background-color: #1e1e1e;\n            }\n            QLabel {\n                color: #e0e0e0;\n            }\n            QPushButton {\n                background-color: #2d2d2d;\n                color: #e0e0e0;\n                border: none;\n                border-radius: 8px;\n                padding: 10px;\n                font-weight: bold;\n                font-family: sans-serif;\n            }\n            QPushButton:hover {\n                background-color: #3d3d3d;\n            }\n            QPushButton:pressed {\n                background-color: #4d4d4d;\n            }\n            QPushButton:checked {\n                background-color: #ff9800;\n                color: #000;\n            }\n            \n            /* Akcenty os */\n            QPushButton[text^=\"X\"] { border-left: 4px solid #ff4444; }\n            QPushButton[text^=\"Y\"] { border-left: 4px solid #44ff44; }\n            QPushButton[text^=\"Z\"] { border-left: 4px solid #4444ff; }\n            \n            QLineEdit {\n                background-color: #121212;\n                border: 1px solid #333;\n                border-radius: 6px;\n                color: #fff;\n                padding: 8px;\n            }\n            QLineEdit:focus {\n                border: 1px solid #ff9800;\n            }\n        \"\"\")\n        \n        # Specifické velikosti\n        for b in [self.btn_x_plus, self.btn_x_minus, self.btn_y_plus, self.btn_y_minus]:\n            b.setFixedSize(80, 60)\n        \n        self.btn_home_xy.setFixedSize(80, 60)\n        \n        for b in [self.btn_z_plus, self.btn_z_minus, self.btn_z_home]:\n            b.setFixedSize(100, 60)\n            \n        self.btn_leveling.setStyleSheet(\"border-bottom: 3px solid #ffeb3b; color: #ffeb3b;\")\n\n    def _update_step(self, val_str):\n        self.current_step = float(val_str)\n        for v, btn in self.step_buttons.items():\n            btn.setChecked(v == val_str)\n\n    def _send_custom_gcode(self):\n        cmd = self.inp_gcode.text().strip()\n        if cmd:\n            self.send_gcode(cmd)\n            self.inp_gcode.clear()\n\n    def move(self, axis, direction):\n        step = self.current_step * direction\n        gcode = f\"G91\\nG0 {axis}{step:.2f} F3000\\nG90\"\n        self.send_gcode(gcode)\n\n    def send_gcode(self, gcode):\n        if self.worker:\n            for line in gcode.split('\\n'):\n                self.worker.send_command(line)\n",
    "file_path": "gui/manual_movement.py"
  }
}

## MODEL ✨

Dialog pro ruční ovládání byl upraven:
1.  **Ovládací prvky:** Tlačítka jsou nyní bez barevných ikon a emoji. Pořadí osy Z bylo změněno na `Z+`, `HOME Z`, `Z-`.
2.  **Chování okna:** Okno je nyní volně přesouvatelné a obsahuje standardní křížek pro zavření v pravém horním rohu.
3.  **Vizuál:** Zachováno moderní tmavé téma s barevnými akcenty na okrajích tlačítek pro lepší orientaci.

Máte nějaké další požadavky?_

## USER 🧑‍💻

Předělej toto okno na pop-up dej možnost dokování do pravého panelu, přidej taky možnost přesouvání okna přetažením kdekoliv mimo tlačítka

---

## MODEL ✨

V souboru `gui/manual_movement.py` provedu zásadní změnu: třídu `ManualMovementDialog` (původně `QDialog`) přeměním na `ManualMovementDock` (dědící z `QDockWidget`). Tím zajistím možnost dokování i režim "pop-up" (floating). Zároveň implementuji logiku pro přesouvání okna tažením za pozadí.

**Tool Command**:

  "name": "write_file",
  "args": {
    "content": "from PyQt6.QtWidgets import (QDockWidget, QVBoxLayout, QHBoxLayout, QGridLayout, \n                             QPushButton, QLineEdit, QLabel, QFrame, QWidget)\nfrom PyQt6.QtCore import Qt, QPoint\n\nclass ManualMovementWidget(QWidget):\n    \"\"\"Vnitřní widget s ovládacími prvky.\"\"\"\n    def __init__(self, printer_worker, parent=None):\n        super().__init__(parent)\n        self.worker = printer_worker\n        self.current_step = 10.0\n        self._drag_pos = QPoint()\n        self._setup_ui()\n        self._apply_styles()\n\n    def _setup_ui(self):\n        self.main_layout = QVBoxLayout(self)\n        self.main_layout.setSpacing(15)\n        self.main_layout.setContentsMargins(20, 20, 20, 20)\n\n        # --- VOLBA KROKU ---\n        step_container = QVBoxLayout()\n        step_label = QLabel(\"KROK POSUNU [mm]\")\n        step_label.setAttribute(Qt.WidgetAttribute.WA_TransparentForMouseEvents)\n        step_label.setStyleSheet(\"color: #aaa; font-weight: bold; font-size: 10px; margin-bottom: 2px;\")\n        step_container.addWidget(step_label)\n        \n        self.layout_steps = QHBoxLayout()\n        self.step_buttons = {}\n        for val in [\"0.1\", \"1\", \"10\", \"50\"]:\n            btn = QPushButton(val)\n            btn.setCheckable(True)\n            btn.setCursor(Qt.CursorShape.PointingHandCursor)\n            btn.clicked.connect(lambda checked, v=val: self._update_step(v))\n            self.layout_steps.addWidget(btn)\n            self.step_buttons[val] = btn\n        \n        self.step_buttons[\"10\"].setChecked(True)\n        step_container.addLayout(self.layout_steps)\n        self.main_layout.addLayout(step_container)\n\n        # --- JOG CONTROL ---\n        controls_layout = QHBoxLayout()\n        controls_layout.setSpacing(20)\n\n        # X/Y Mřížka\n        xy_container = QVBoxLayout()\n        xy_label = QLabel(\"POHYB X / Y\")\n        xy_label.setAttribute(Qt.WidgetAttribute.WA_TransparentForMouseEvents)\n        xy_label.setStyleSheet(\"color: #aaa; font-weight: bold; font-size: 10px;\")\n        xy_container.addWidget(xy_label)\n        \n        xy_grid = QGridLayout()\n        xy_grid.setSpacing(6)\n        self.btn_y_plus = QPushButton(\"Y+\"); self.btn_y_minus = QPushButton(\"Y-\")\n        self.btn_x_plus = QPushButton(\"X+\"); self.btn_x_minus = QPushButton(\"X-\")\n        self.btn_home_xy = QPushButton(\"HOME XY\")\n        \n        xy_grid.addWidget(self.btn_y_plus, 0, 1)\n        xy_grid.addWidget(self.btn_x_minus, 1, 0)\n        xy_grid.addWidget(self.btn_home_xy, 1, 1)\n        xy_grid.addWidget(self.btn_x_plus, 1, 2)\n        xy_grid.addWidget(self.btn_y_minus, 2, 1)\n        xy_container.addLayout(xy_grid)\n        controls_layout.addLayout(xy_container)\n\n        # Z Sloupec\n        z_container = QVBoxLayout()\n        z_label = QLabel(\"OSA Z\")\n        z_label.setAttribute(Qt.WidgetAttribute.WA_TransparentForMouseEvents)\n        z_label.setStyleSheet(\"color: #aaa; font-weight: bold; font-size: 10px;\")\n        z_container.addWidget(z_label)\n        \n        self.btn_z_plus = QPushButton(\"Z+\")\n        self.btn_z_home = QPushButton(\"HOME Z\")\n        self.btn_z_minus = QPushButton(\"Z-\")\n        \n        z_container.addWidget(self.btn_z_plus)\n        z_container.addWidget(self.btn_z_home)\n        z_container.addWidget(self.btn_z_minus)\n        z_container.addStretch()\n        controls_layout.addLayout(z_container)\n        self.main_layout.addLayout(controls_layout)\n\n        # --- VLASTNÍ G-CODE ---\n        gcode_container = QVBoxLayout()\n        gcode_label = QLabel(\"VLASTNÍ PŘÍKAZ\")\n        gcode_label.setAttribute(Qt.WidgetAttribute.WA_TransparentForMouseEvents)\n        gcode_label.setStyleSheet(\"color: #aaa; font-weight: bold; font-size: 10px;\")\n        gcode_container.addWidget(gcode_label)\n        \n        gcode_input_layout = QHBoxLayout()\n        self.inp_gcode = QLineEdit(); self.inp_gcode.setPlaceholderText(\"G-code...\")\n        self.inp_gcode.returnPressed.connect(self._send_custom_gcode)\n        self.btn_send_gcode = QPushButton(\"ODESLAT\"); self.btn_send_gcode.setFixedWidth(80)\n        self.btn_send_gcode.clicked.connect(self._send_custom_gcode)\n        gcode_input_layout.addWidget(self.inp_gcode); gcode_input_layout.addWidget(self.btn_send_gcode)\n        gcode_container.addLayout(gcode_input_layout)\n        self.main_layout.addLayout(gcode_container)\n\n        # --- SERVISNÍ ---\n        self.btn_leveling = QPushButton(\"MĚŘENÍ PODLOŽKY (G80)\")\n        self.btn_leveling.clicked.connect(lambda: self.send_gcode(\"G80\"))\n        self.btn_motors_off = QPushButton(\"VYPNUTÍ MOTORŮ\")\n        self.btn_motors_off.clicked.connect(lambda: self.send_gcode(\"M84\"))\n        self.main_layout.addWidget(self.btn_leveling)\n        self.main_layout.addWidget(self.btn_motors_off)\n\n        # Propojení pohybu\n        self.btn_x_plus.clicked.connect(lambda: self.move(\"X\", 1))\n        self.btn_x_minus.clicked.connect(lambda: self.move(\"X\", -1))\n        self.btn_y_plus.clicked.connect(lambda: self.move(\"Y\", 1))\n        self.btn_y_minus.clicked.connect(lambda: self.move(\"Y\", -1))\n        self.btn_z_plus.clicked.connect(lambda: self.move(\"Z\", 1))\n        self.btn_z_minus.clicked.connect(lambda: self.move(\"Z\", -1))\n        self.btn_home_xy.clicked.connect(lambda: self.send_gcode(\"G28 X Y\"))\n        self.btn_z_home.clicked.connect(lambda: self.send_gcode(\"G28 Z\"))\n\n    def _apply_styles(self):\n        self.setStyleSheet(\"\"\"\n            QWidget { background-color: #1e1e1e; color: #e0e0e0; }\n            QPushButton {\n                background-color: #2d2d2d; color: #e0e0e0; border: none;\n                border-radius: 6px; padding: 8px; font-weight: bold;\n            }\n            QPushButton:hover { background-color: #3d3d3d; }\n            QPushButton:checked { background-color: #ff9800; color: #000; }\n            \n            QPushButton[text^=\"X\"] { border-left: 3px solid #ff4444; }\n            QPushButton[text^=\"Y\"] { border-left: 3px solid #44ff44; }\n            QPushButton[text^=\"Z\"] { border-left: 3px solid #4444ff; }\n            \n            QLineEdit { background-color: #121212; border: 1px solid #333; border-radius: 4px; color: #fff; padding: 6px; }\n            QLineEdit:focus { border: 1px solid #ff9800; }\n        \"\"\")\n        for b in [self.btn_x_plus, self.btn_x_minus, self.btn_y_plus, self.btn_y_minus, self.btn_home_xy]:\n            b.setFixedSize(75, 55)\n        for b in [self.btn_z_plus, self.btn_z_minus, self.btn_z_home]:\n            b.setFixedSize(90, 55)\n        self.btn_leveling.setStyleSheet(\"border-bottom: 2px solid #ffeb3b; color: #ffeb3b;\")\n\n    def _update_step(self, val_str):\n        self.current_step = float(val_str)\n        for v, btn in self.step_buttons.items(): btn.setChecked(v == val_str)\n\n    def _send_custom_gcode(self):\n        cmd = self.inp_gcode.text().strip()\n        if cmd: self.send_gcode(cmd); self.inp_gcode.clear()\n\n    def move(self, axis, direction):\n        gcode = f\"G91\\nG0 {axis}{self.current_step * direction:.2f} F3000\\nG90\"\n        self.send_gcode(gcode)\n\n    def send_gcode(self, gcode):\n        if self.worker:\n            for line in gcode.split('\\n'): self.worker.send_command(line)\n\n    def mousePressEvent(self, event):\n        if event.button() == Qt.MouseButton.LeftButton:\n            self._drag_pos = event.globalPosition().toPoint()\n            event.accept()\n\n    def mouseMoveEvent(self, event):\n        if event.buttons() == Qt.MouseButton.LeftButton:\n            parent_dock = self.parent()\n            while parent_dock and not isinstance(parent_dock, QDockWidget):\n                parent_dock = parent_dock.parent()\n            \n            if parent_dock and parent_dock.isFloating():\n                delta = event.globalPosition().toPoint() - self._drag_pos\n                parent_dock.move(parent_dock.pos() + delta)\n                self._drag_pos = event.globalPosition().toPoint()\n                event.accept()\n\nclass ManualMovementDock(QDockWidget):\n    def __init__(self, printer_worker, parent=None):\n        super().__init__(\"Ruční ovládání\", parent)\n        self.setAllowedAreas(Qt.DockWidgetArea.RightDockWidgetArea | Qt.DockWidgetArea.LeftDockWidgetArea)\n        self.setFeatures(QDockWidget.DockWidgetFeature.DockWidgetMovable | \n                         QDockWidget.DockWidgetFeature.DockWidgetFloatable | \n                         QDockWidget.DockWidgetFeature.DockWidgetClosable)\n        \n        self.inner_widget = ManualMovementWidget(printer_worker, self)\n        self.setWidget(self.inner_widget)\n        self.setMinimumWidth(300)\n        self.setFloating(True)\n        self.hide()\n",
    "file_path": "gui/manual_movement.py"
  }
}

font-weight: bold; font-size: 10px;\")\n        gcode_container.addWidget(gcode_label)\n        \n        gcode_input_layout = QHBoxLayout()\n        self.inp_gcode = QLineEdit(); self.inp_gcode.setPlaceholderText(\"G-code...\")\n        self.inp_gcode.returnPressed.connect(self._send_custom_gcode)\n        self.btn_send_gcode = QPushButton(\"ODESLAT\"); color: #e0e0e0; }\n            QPushButton {\n                background-color: #2d2d2d; color: #e0e0e0; border: none;\n                border-radius: 6px; padding: 8px; font-weight: bold;\n            }\n            QPushButton:hover { background-color: #3d3d3d; }\n            QPushButton[text^=\"Z\"] { border-left: 3px solid #4444ff; }\n            \n            QLineEdit { background-color: #121212; border: 1px solid #333; border-radius: 4px; color: #fff; padding: 6px; color: #ffeb3b;\")\n\n    def _update_step(self, val_str):\n        self.current_step = float(val_str)\n        for v, btn in self.step_buttons.items(): btn.setChecked(v == val_str)\n\n    def _send_custom_gcode(self):\n        cmd = self.inp_gcode.text().strip()\n        if cmd: self.send_gcode(cmd); self.inp_gcode.clear()\n\n    def move(self, axis, direction):\n        gcode = f\"G91\\nG0 {axis}{self.current_step * direction:.2f} F3000\\nG90\"\n        self.send_gcode(gcode)\n\n    def send_gcode(self, gcode):\n        if self.worker:\n            for line in gcode.split('\\n'): self.worker.send_command(line)\n\n    def mousePressEvent(self, event):\n        if event.button() == Qt.MouseButton.LeftButton:\n            self._drag_pos = event.globalPosition().toPoint()\n            event.accept()\n\n    def mouseMoveEvent(self, event):\n        if event.buttons() == Qt.MouseButton.LeftButton:\n            parent_dock = self.parent()\n            while parent_dock and not isinstance(parent_dock, QDockWidget):\n                parent_dock = parent_dock.parent()\n            \n            if parent_dock and parent_dock.isFloating():\n                delta = event.globalPosition().toPoint() - self._drag_pos\n                parent_dock.move(parent_dock.pos() + delta)\n                self._drag_pos = event.globalPosition().toPoint()\n                event.accept()\n\nclass ManualMovementDock(QDockWidget):\n    def __init__(self, printer_worker, parent=None):\n        super().__init__(\"Ruční ovládání\", parent)\n        self.setAllowedAreas(Qt.DockWidgetArea.RightDockWidgetArea | Qt.DockWidgetArea.LeftDockWidgetArea)\n        self.setFeatures(QDockWidget.DockWidgetFeature.DockWidgetMovable | \n                         QDockWidget.DockWidgetFeature.DockWidgetFloatable | \n                         QDockWidget.DockWidgetFeature.DockWidgetClosable)\n        \n        self.inner_widget = ManualMovementWidget(printer_worker, self)\n        self.setWidget(self.inner_widget)\n        self.setMinimumWidth(300)\n        self.setFloating(True)\n        self.hide()\n"
  }
}

## MODEL ✨

Panel pro ruční ovládání byl úspěšně přepracován na dokovatelné pop-up okno (`QDockWidget`):

1.  **Flexibilita:** Okno lze nyní libovolně přesouvat (ve floating režimu i tažením za pozadí mimo tlačítka), zavřít křížkem, nebo zadokovat k pravému či levému okraji aplikace (přetažením k okraji).
2.  **Moderní UI:** Zachován tmavý styl Mainsail/Fluidd s barevnými akcenty os. Popisky prvků jsou nastaveny tak, aby nebránily tažení okna.
3.  **Integrace:** Panel se nyní inicializuje spolu s aplikací a lze jej kdykoliv vyvolat z menu "Nastavení -> Ruční ovládání".

Máte nějaké další požadavky?_

Content from @gui/right_panel.py:
from PyQt6.QtWidgets import (QDockWidget, QWidget, QVBoxLayout, QScrollArea,
                             QFormLayout, QDoubleSpinBox, QSpinBox, QToolButton, 
                             QPushButton, QComboBox, QHBoxLayout)
from PyQt6.QtCore import Qt, pyqtSignal

class CollapsibleBox(QWidget):
    def __init__(self, title="", parent=None):
        super().__init__(parent)
        self.setFixedWidth(350)
        self.toggle_button = QToolButton(text=title, checkable=True, checked=False)
        self.toggle_button.setStyleSheet("QToolButton { border: none; font-weight: bold; color: #0d6efd; }")
        self.toggle_button.setToolButtonStyle(Qt.ToolButtonStyle.ToolButtonTextBesideIcon)
        self.toggle_button.setArrowType(Qt.ArrowType.RightArrow)
        self.toggle_button.pressed.connect(self.on_pressed)

        self.content_area = QWidget()
        self.content_area.setVisible(False)

        lay = QVBoxLayout(self)
        lay.setContentsMargins(0, 0, 0, 5)
        lay.addWidget(self.toggle_button)
        lay.addWidget(self.content_area)

    def on_pressed(self):
        checked = not self.toggle_button.isChecked()
        self.toggle_button.setArrowType(Qt.ArrowType.DownArrow if checked else Qt.ArrowType.RightArrow)
        self.content_area.setVisible(checked)

class RightPanel(QDockWidget):
    values_changed = pyqtSignal()

    def __init__(self, parent=None):
        super().__init__("Lokální parametry sklíček", parent)
        self.setAllowedAreas(Qt.DockWidgetArea.RightDockWidgetArea | Qt.DockWidgetArea.LeftDockWidgetArea)

        self.scroll_widget = QWidget()
        self.scroll_layout = QVBoxLayout(self.scroll_widget)
        self.scroll_layout.setAlignment(Qt.AlignmentFlag.AlignTop)

        scroll_area = QScrollArea()
        scroll_area.setWidgetResizable(True)
        scroll_area.setWidget(self.scroll_widget)
        self.setWidget(scroll_area)

        self.slide_widgets = {}
        self.local_modifications = {} 
        self.current_count = 0
        self._is_syncing = False
        self.last_global_params = {}

    def update_slides(self, count, global_params):
        self.last_global_params = global_params
        
        if count != self.current_count:
            self.current_count = count

            for i in reversed(range(self.scroll_layout.count())):
                widget = self.scroll_layout.itemAt(i).widget()
                if widget: widget.deleteLater()
            self.slide_widgets.clear()

            self._is_syncing = True
            for i in range(count):
                if i not in self.local_modifications:
                    self.local_modifications[i] = {
                        'z_offset': False, 'extrusion_rate': False, 
                        'print_speed': False, 'infill_val': False, 'infill_type': False
                    }
                
                box = CollapsibleBox(f"Sklíčko {i + 1}")
                form = QFormLayout(box.content_area)

                btn_reset = QPushButton("Zrušit lokální změny")
                btn_reset.setStyleSheet("QPushButton { background-color: #6c757d; padding: 4px; font-size: 9pt; margin-bottom: 5px; } QPushButton:hover { background-color: #5c636a; }")
                btn_reset.clicked.connect(lambda checked, idx=i: self.reset_slide(idx))
                from PyQt6.QtWidgets import QLineEdit
                inp_name = QLineEdit()
                inp_name.setPlaceholderText(f"Sklíčko {i + 1}")
                inp_name.textChanged.connect(lambda text, b=box, idx=i: b.toggle_button.setText(text if text.strip() else f"Sklíčko {idx + 1}"))
                inp_note = QLineEdit()
                inp_note.setPlaceholderText("Laboratorní poznámka...")
                    
                inp_z = QDoubleSpinBox()
                inp_z.setRange(0.0, 5.0)
                inp_z.setSingleStep(0.05)

                inp_ext = QDoubleSpinBox()
                inp_ext.setRange(0.001, 100.0)
                inp_ext.setSingleStep(0.1)
                inp_ext.setDecimals(3)

                inp_speed = QSpinBox()
                inp_speed.setRange(10, 10000)
                inp_speed.setSingleStep(100)

                # --- VÝPLŇ A JEDNOTKY ---
                widget_infill = QWidget()
                layout_infill = QHBoxLayout(widget_infill)
                layout_infill.setContentsMargins(0, 0, 0, 0)
                
                inp_infill = QDoubleSpinBox()
                inp_infill.setRange(0.1, 200.0)
                inp_infill.setSingleStep(0.1)

                cmb_infill_type = QComboBox()
                cmb_infill_type.addItems(["mm", "%"])

                layout_infill.addWidget(inp_infill)
                layout_infill.addWidget(cmb_infill_type)

                # Napojení signálů
                inp_z.valueChanged.connect(lambda val, idx=i: self.mark_modified(idx, 'z_offset'))
                inp_ext.valueChanged.connect(lambda val, idx=i: self.mark_modified(idx, 'extrusion_rate'))
                inp_speed.valueChanged.connect(lambda val, idx=i: self.mark_modified(idx, 'print_speed'))
                inp_infill.valueChanged.connect(lambda val, idx=i: self.mark_modified(idx, 'infill_val'))
                cmb_infill_type.currentIndexChanged.connect(lambda val, idx=i: self.mark_modified(idx, 'infill_type'))

                form.addRow(btn_reset)
                form.addRow("Název:", inp_name)
                form.addRow("Poznámka:", inp_note)
                form.addRow("Z-offset [mm]:", inp_z)
                form.addRow("Extruze [µl/mm]:", inp_ext)
                form.addRow("Rychlost [mm/min]:", inp_speed)
                form.addRow("Hustota výplně:", widget_infill)

                self.scroll_layout.addWidget(box)
                self.slide_widgets[i] = {
                    'name': inp_name, 'note': inp_note,
                    'z_offset': inp_z, 'extrusion_rate': inp_ext,
                    'print_speed': inp_speed, 'infill_val': inp_infill,
                    'infill_type': cmb_infill_type
                }
            self._is_syncing = False

        self.sync_globals(global_params)

    def sync_globals(self, global_params):
        self._is_syncing = True
        for i, widgets in self.slide_widgets.items():
            mods = self.local_modifications[i]
            if not mods['z_offset']: widgets['z_offset'].setValue(global_params.get('z_offset', 0.2))
            if not mods['extrusion_rate']: widgets['extrusion_rate'].setValue(global_params.get('extrusion_rate', 0.05))
            if not mods['print_speed']: widgets['print_speed'].setValue(global_params.get('print_speed', 1500))
            if not mods['infill_val']: widgets['infill_val'].setValue(global_params.get('infill_val', 1.0))
            if not mods['infill_type']: widgets['infill_type'].setCurrentText(global_params.get('infill_type', 'mm'))
        self._is_syncing = False

    def mark_modified(self, idx, param):
        if not self._is_syncing:
            self.local_modifications[idx][param] = True
            self.values_changed.emit()

    def reset_slide(self, idx):
        self.local_modifications[idx] = {
            'z_offset': False, 'extrusion_rate': False, 
            'print_speed': False, 'infill_val': False, 'infill_type': False
        }
        if self.last_global_params:
            self.sync_globals(self.last_global_params)
        self.values_changed.emit()

    def get_overrides(self):
        overrides = {}
        for i, data in self.slide_widgets.items():
            mods = self.local_modifications[i]
            slide_data = {
                'name': data['name'].text() or data['name'].placeholderText(),
                'note': data['note'].text()
            }
            if mods['z_offset']: slide_data['z_offset'] = data['z_offset'].value()
            if mods['extrusion_rate']: slide_data['extrusion_rate'] = data['extrusion_rate'].value()
            if mods['print_speed']: slide_data['print_speed'] = data['print_speed'].value()
            if mods['infill_val']: slide_data['infill_val'] = data['infill_val'].value()
            if mods['infill_type']: slide_data['infill_type'] = data['infill_type'].currentText()
            
            if slide_data:
                overrides[i] = slide_data
        return overrides

## USER 🧑‍💻

ještě malá změna zruš dokování manuálního nastavení (možnost zavřít nahrať zabalením) a místo toho se panel otevře nad @gui/right_panel.py a šířka panelu se pak upraví podle ovládání posuvu

Content from @gui/right_panel.py:
from PyQt6.QtWidgets import (QDockWidget, QWidget, QVBoxLayout, QScrollArea,
                             QFormLayout, QDoubleSpinBox, QSpinBox, QToolButton, 
                             QPushButton, QComboBox, QHBoxLayout)
from PyQt6.QtCore import Qt, pyqtSignal

class CollapsibleBox(QWidget):
    def __init__(self, title="", parent=None):
        super().__init__(parent)
        self.setFixedWidth(350)
        self.toggle_button = QToolButton(text=title, checkable=True, checked=False)
        self.toggle_button.setStyleSheet("QToolButton { border: none; font-weight: bold; color: #0d6efd; }")
        self.toggle_button.setToolButtonStyle(Qt.ToolButtonStyle.ToolButtonTextBesideIcon)
        self.toggle_button.setArrowType(Qt.ArrowType.RightArrow)
        self.toggle_button.pressed.connect(self.on_pressed)

        self.content_area = QWidget()
        self.content_area.setVisible(False)

        lay = QVBoxLayout(self)
        lay.setContentsMargins(0, 0, 0, 5)
        lay.addWidget(self.toggle_button)
        lay.addWidget(self.content_area)

    def on_pressed(self):
        checked = not self.toggle_button.isChecked()
        self.toggle_button.setArrowType(Qt.ArrowType.DownArrow if checked else Qt.ArrowType.RightArrow)
        self.content_area.setVisible(checked)

class RightPanel(QWidget):
    values_changed = pyqtSignal()

    def __init__(self, parent=None):
        super().__init__(parent)
        self.setFixedWidth(350)

        main_layout = QVBoxLayout(self)
        main_layout.setContentsMargins(0, 0, 0, 0)

        self.scroll_widget = QWidget()
        self.scroll_layout = QVBoxLayout(self.scroll_widget)
        self.scroll_layout.setAlignment(Qt.AlignmentFlag.AlignTop)

        scroll_area = QScrollArea()
        scroll_area.setWidgetResizable(True)
        scroll_area.setWidget(self.scroll_widget)
        main_layout.addWidget(scroll_area)

        self.slide_widgets = {}
        self.local_modifications = {} 
        self.current_count = 0
        self._is_syncing = False
        self.last_global_params = {}

    def update_slides(self, count, global_params):
        self.last_global_params = global_params
        
        if count != self.current_count:
            self.current_count = count

            for i in reversed(range(self.scroll_layout.count())):
                widget = self.scroll_layout.itemAt(i).widget()
                if widget: widget.deleteLater()
            self.slide_widgets.clear()

            self._is_syncing = True
            for i in range(count):
                if i not in self.local_modifications:
                    self.local_modifications[i] = {
                        'z_offset': False, 'extrusion_rate': False, 
                        'print_speed': False, 'infill_val': False, 'infill_type': False
                    }
                
                box = CollapsibleBox(f"Sklíčko {i + 1}")
                form = QFormLayout(box.content_area)

                btn_reset = QPushButton("Zrušit lokální změny")
                btn_reset.setStyleSheet("QPushButton { background-color: #6c757d; padding: 4px; font-size: 9pt; margin-bottom: 5px; } QPushButton:hover { background-color: #5c636a; }")
                btn_reset.clicked.connect(lambda checked, idx=i: self.reset_slide(idx))
                from PyQt6.QtWidgets import QLineEdit
                inp_name = QLineEdit()
                inp_name.setPlaceholderText(f"Sklíčko {i + 1}")
                inp_name.textChanged.connect(lambda text, b=box, idx=i: b.toggle_button.setText(text if text.strip() else f"Sklíčko {idx + 1}"))
                inp_note = QLineEdit()
                inp_note.setPlaceholderText("Laboratorní poznámka...")
                    
                inp_z = QDoubleSpinBox()
                inp_z.setRange(0.0, 5.0)
                inp_z.setSingleStep(0.05)

                inp_ext = QDoubleSpinBox()
                inp_ext.setRange(0.001, 100.0)
                inp_ext.setSingleStep(0.1)
                inp_ext.setDecimals(3)

                inp_speed = QSpinBox()
                inp_speed.setRange(10, 10000)
                inp_speed.setSingleStep(100)

                # --- VÝPLŇ A JEDNOTKY ---
                widget_infill = QWidget()
                layout_infill = QHBoxLayout(widget_infill)
                layout_infill.setContentsMargins(0, 0, 0, 0)
                
                inp_infill = QDoubleSpinBox()
                inp_infill.setRange(0.1, 200.0)
                inp_infill.setSingleStep(0.1)

                cmb_infill_type = QComboBox()
                cmb_infill_type.addItems(["mm", "%"])

                layout_infill.addWidget(inp_infill)
                layout_infill.addWidget(cmb_infill_type)

                # Napojení signálů
                inp_z.valueChanged.connect(lambda val, idx=i: self.mark_modified(idx, 'z_offset'))
                inp_ext.valueChanged.connect(lambda val, idx=i: self.mark_modified(idx, 'extrusion_rate'))
                inp_speed.valueChanged.connect(lambda val, idx=i: self.mark_modified(idx, 'print_speed'))
                inp_infill.valueChanged.connect(lambda val, idx=i: self.mark_modified(idx, 'infill_val'))
                cmb_infill_type.currentIndexChanged.connect(lambda val, idx=i: self.mark_modified(idx, 'infill_type'))

                form.addRow(btn_reset)
                form.addRow("Název:", inp_name)
                form.addRow("Poznámka:", inp_note)
                form.addRow("Z-offset [mm]:", inp_z)
                form.addRow("Extruze [µl/mm]:", inp_ext)
                form.addRow("Rychlost [mm/min]:", inp_speed)
                form.addRow("Hustota výplně:", widget_infill)

                self.scroll_layout.addWidget(box)
                self.slide_widgets[i] = {
                    'name': inp_name, 'note': inp_note,
                    'z_offset': inp_z, 'extrusion_rate': inp_ext,
                    'print_speed': inp_speed, 'infill_val': inp_infill,
                    'infill_type': cmb_infill_type
                }
            self._is_syncing = False

        self.sync_globals(global_params)

    def sync_globals(self, global_params):
        self._is_syncing = True
        for i, widgets in self.slide_widgets.items():
            mods = self.local_modifications[i]
            if not mods['z_offset']: widgets['z_offset'].setValue(global_params.get('z_offset', 0.2))
            if not mods['extrusion_rate']: widgets['extrusion_rate'].setValue(global_params.get('extrusion_rate', 0.05))
            if not mods['print_speed']: widgets['print_speed'].setValue(global_params.get('print_speed', 1500))
            if not mods['infill_val']: widgets['infill_val'].setValue(global_params.get('infill_val', 1.0))
            if not mods['infill_type']: widgets['infill_type'].setCurrentText(global_params.get('infill_type', 'mm'))
        self._is_syncing = False

    def mark_modified(self, idx, param):
        if not self._is_syncing:
            self.local_modifications[idx][param] = True
            self.values_changed.emit()

    def reset_slide(self, idx):
        self.local_modifications[idx] = {
            'z_offset': False, 'extrusion_rate': False, 
            'print_speed': False, 'infill_val': False, 'infill_type': False
        }
        if self.last_global_params:
            self.sync_globals(self.last_global_params)
        self.values_changed.emit()

    def get_overrides(self):
        overrides = {}
        for i, data in self.slide_widgets.items():
            mods = self.local_modifications[i]
            slide_data = {
                'name': data['name'].text() or data['name'].placeholderText(),
                'note': data['note'].text()
            }
            if mods['z_offset']: slide_data['z_offset'] = data['z_offset'].value()
            if mods['extrusion_rate']: slide_data['extrusion_rate'] = data['extrusion_rate'].value()
            if mods['print_speed']: slide_data['print_speed'] = data['print_speed'].value()
            if mods['infill_val']: slide_data['infill_val'] = data['infill_val'].value()
            if mods['infill_type']: slide_data['infill_type'] = data['infill_type'].currentText()
            
            if slide_data:
                overrides[i] = slide_data
        return overrides
--- End of content ---

Provedu integraci ručního ovládání přímo do pravého panelu jako zabalitelné sekce.

### 1. Úprava `gui/manual_movement.py`
Odstraňuji třídu `ManualMovementDock` a upravuji `ManualMovementWidget` tak, aby byl určen pro přímé vložení do jiného layoutu (odstraňuji logiku tažení okna).
